subject: I’ll keep this short:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=kwAGtXIYcKM3L8HyyuRCKK7nsu97lcbqUDYv0GfKvDhnDm3EiBwiWKnkCAkAH55F6z5D2pzkAjAZiy859g%2FQ%2BoyaD1RfQsBd%2FgHmyYnAq1kIs0GJsorJIerUpPePxx3j6G005rQ7eCn6O9xoj3rtXhf73YhArfTImkG6CQ9mveYJtcNxCOQ8WuZ0lCtVmiwcs3%2FQKIdQPYlPfUuGsS0EJLLfkWRAW%2Fy4MwA2EcilhBmr5fK3l3UquRwNzh1e7zSCTIWmSWiP29Nn8d8Qz3pqBTD1K7zSEXcBQtn%2FehFXJbfR5%2BD2S4JcMDx%2BoSL1UTsR2Ol7%2BSuR60qX8wXOvXcEJOeOdTrp6wjva0KwfUQctTYilczeTqRslSD6pkTo649hIKKvnBy%2BT6dQZVUi%2B%2F7r3h2TcQWNTfaHyWH5n0ukI1NmCxtRxISbMiocaSkMfuZj]

# [#]
I’lll keep this as short as possible.

CA-25 is on Donald Trump’s radar after he made serious gains in this district in 2024. National Republicans are already preparing to flip this seat red, replace me with an extreme MAGA loyalist, and solidify their control of the House for another two years.

We can’t let that happen. Will you rush $ to my campaign right now to help us flip the House blue in 2026? Here’s a link for you: secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-feb25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-feb25?amount=]

Thank you.

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

Stream "Prayer of Your People (Camp Elah Sessions)" on iTunes or Spotify!!!| | | This is **Sean** with an update on our new album, _Prayer of Your People_. From inside the walls of Camp Elah, **revival is rising** , touching every level of government before settling at the **feet of Jesus!** Help keep _Prayer of Your People_ at **#1 on iTunes** by listening **[**HERE**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=3e5ee138276b412b8bb854d7dabd01ac&_e=4eiL3nI1Ej--XkMEWWt3DtdrEt7uYHPV8gvY28Dv0yB13jykYLmUQKRgPCqYkV1m0QwKyH9IpCYLMuvp9nIS9NBIS7DQJWL6CcUKQHsgjAgJ20hR1xFXfP-26aynpTnr6BGYhxg_cClrZeUgGH0Kb-9JKi6sg4XEbZC4zSSUBRoBGH6sf8TikfdAUym4uXEz0kFMcA-E267FusY27jXI28rG1ePlotH0IFoVU7TmohVVh6EvZFXfNhixdNDFHqDOQxC9KYTjFIsHpJRheJPgGUXAoihUX6gI8KGdw4phNJ9ze83JIBoXT1_mCHi3Vgsi4I9CDIHFh1cggOEEMuaJg4zmGlz5f1xGOcWr7upjaM0%3D)** or through the link below! body:
# [#] Friends,

We have just a few hours left until our February mid-month deadline, and I wanted to reach out one last time.

Please, if you’re able, donate here to help us off the strength of our grassroots base. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]

Thank you,

Josh
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. body:
We thought that **[EVERYBODY](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/J00Nau6ULenVRP8BLMdIlMENYQYHjUaIGloUvJpaUW3Zg3c2Z8cXaEyKOISp87HCgPxzwEORkTdlGbZVq9-yD4UgS2wTe7zQxUgHin6AT8tOuJ1JSgK_IsDZ17vpqelsIP_UUWaiFexdjf3gQ1Oh4zCB_5fYmxWw8nYTj6XMJzo5yc8GF1IHop15baC2Glkla-nHBQNyOySxm-AdtwoFmFUx4g3524r-MizNKXRRPy1yyRFiXt5_OQ3GxSC6KFS5K94NxJwVwmcJOEhREjnfSmyY5NihCodbpUmRcQTWtTaFi6JC-H_IxpRScg_r8SII6mtqnThaeNdtlGLM5NBhWS6wbkO1QpM-xT4slRahkmlnzfpb0aMNYJBMh0EGqrQfEf4TxA6a94ReaGfW9eZ5CKT8-Vu4s_H2KDPuvLgU2DRu8Z02Wm09hwh_JUG6BTlFA2d_eeRRZGQd-HB6-GqOlXBTTQWgLR0WPeAu_vzzps-rV7YLOhfAmzzKxZzwb--m2P7V_vefj6HvXAUqQoJ76j5lTe06YARuwMIi6kjCgVhJVB9DT88T2eRS7u2pi80ixHWLy2lgFwQ-hv4jC_Va9Iqe9bsq4S7tYGnviw/BWwQRzhGdBOIYX2G4M4DJhcelWIAvghL/6)** was on the same page here, Peter.

This week, early reports showed that Marjorie Taylor Greene is looking to jump into one of two races here in Georgia in 2026: either the U.S. Senate or the Governor’s race.
We know what to expect from this. As one of Trump’s top allies, a flood of dark money is going to enter whatever race she chooses the second she launches her campaign.
But we’re taking this as an opportunity — an opportunity to get Marjorie Taylor Greene out of every level of government for GOOD.
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we need all hands on deck to send a message that we’re ready to put an end to Marjorie Taylor Greene’s reign of terror.

I’m reaching out about a critical opportunity we have here in Georgia — one that I need your help with. Before I explain, if you’re all in to help us create a blue wave in Georgia in 2026, = | | = This week, early reports showed that Marjorie Taylor Greene is looking to jump into one of two races here in Georgia in 2026: either the U.S. Senate or the Governor’s race. We know what to expect from this. As one of Trump’s top allies, a flood of dark money is going to enter whatever race she chooses the second she launches her campaign. But we’re taking this as an opportunity — an opportunity to get Marjorie Taylor Greene out of every level of government for GOOD. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we need all hands on deck to send a message that we’re ready to put an end to Marjorie Taylor Greene’s reign of terror. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being an essential part of our team — enjoy the rest of your weekend! body:

I'm new to the Senate, but I'm no stranger to a tough fight.

When it comes to confirming President Trump's team, a tough fight is what we're getting from Democrats. They're doing everything they can to obstruct the process.

But Senate Republicans were elected to win tough fights.

_If that means working nights, weekends, and holidays, so be it._

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What the media hides about birthright citizenship
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqngungr98eqig7g43rq21h44hkt74aibbgsnrk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor2cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znsdfdog7qs5kdvu0fl7s5k6lj380sgarl5do54o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor2cth2bs)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: A free video series about Lewis and Tolkien
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztb9dofbo83to6iahf986jb566i76ll17k0f4fdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor5clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8r8sg1ef2e68c8sei2ilhnvug7i2jaq79bt4hno_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor5clh2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv6cfku4ghs6g9uimfra3o37ik38skksp3ufikq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor5clh2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkv635bv3rj0r0ajpj2hc37aimtot1pfg673mrl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor5clh2bs)**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z62d0h17dvathqb7abdpc0t76tu0vu39vjk7uhgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor1c1h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqt3vo18u36khn044ocvinbkeume9frsg0bnhae8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor1c1h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlssuch45nt5qmdl18cblmkrk7dkb9it50njn9s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6cor1c1h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Trump Train News
---

clean_body: Take a moment to look around. | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: America’s Founders rejected this idea
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt9e487m6k4iva0qqdk1fghfpa1dpvfidbk69fi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6aob2clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1d4q6pb6aue6mtmifpb7m92j5t0hqupn7n5rnlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6aob2clh2bs)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Updates for Great Americans

Now, Democrat activist judges are trying to SABOTAGE the very nominees our majority is confirming for President Trump: [Source: Fox News] But rest assured, friend, we will not allow the Left's stall tactics and dirty tricks to slow down our majority. We will continue to CONFIRM President Trump's Cabinet the easy way or the hard way. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjkvqg9kj4fqenkqbdnf3uc95me5knqcl2jm6q20_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6eoj2cth2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb35ebeudtb48buncuh2h27c6vaqhdqcee57d0po_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6eoj2cth2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znnoljdfo69fq6qksmrjpufa08pp02l49hiaj0i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6eoj2cth2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4skmq567qdaokl2f76rd884h4eb2jttbcop0gfo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob0chh61ob246h22sh2s8i6epj4stg6eoj2cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoddbqk39mdmhrsqilv3evoi009k1006gep2t8qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6eoj2cth2bs)_

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Misunderstanding American citizenship
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4uskqee36ap0d2eh27bg50mjettga68klt4r670_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6eoj2c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjhqu46gqrnfu6atsbolkq6bgfd5ncm5ls563rjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4stg6eoj2c3h2bs)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:

| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20316/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/5754bb5e18b714d4c532d13be43ae7b01bb588bb). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

Hello Reader, Are you in search of a state-of-the-art camera that offers discreet surveillance, high-quality footage, and WiFi Compatibility? Look no further! Gunner Gear is thrilled to present our latest addition: **The WiFi Spy Cam**. **Pocket-Sized Powerhouse** : Gone are the days when surveillance cameras were bulky and noticeable. Our WiFi Spy Cam is designed to fit snugly in your pocket. It's WiFi-enabled and crafted for discretion, ensuring that you have the power of surveillance right at your fingertips, anytime, anywhere. **Crystal-Clear, Day & Night**: With full HD imaging, an expansive 170° field of view, and night vision capabilities, you can trust the Spy Cam to capture every detail with unmatched precision. Whether it's daytime or nighttime, you'll never miss a moment. Stay connected to your home from anywhere with the WiFi-enabled Spy Cam. Designed for seamless remote monitoring, this compact device lets you keep an eye on what matters most in real time. Whether you’re at work, on vacation, or just in another room, its WiFi capabilities ensure you’re always in control. **Special Launch Offer!** : Because we appreciate you, we're giving our loyal customers an exclusive opportunity to be among the first to own the Spy Cam. [Order now and get a whopping 50% off!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20316/6374453/90e70f9a1ce4f451f66c2b22b8a6ce6b9e2ea1a1/5754bb5e18b714d4c532d13be43ae7b01bb588bb) This offer won't last long, so don’t miss out. The WiFi Spy Cam is more than just a camera; it's a testament to the future of surveillance. Whether you’re safeguarding your home, capturing life's moments, or looking after your valuables, we've got you covered. Upgrade your surveillance game with the WiFi Spy Cam, and embrace the future of security, today. [Order the WiFi Spy Cam Now & Save 50%](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20316/6374453/90e70f9a1ce4f451f66c2b22b8a6ce6b9e2ea1a1/5754bb5e18b714d4c532d13be43ae7b01bb588bb) **Best regards,

~John, _GunnerGear.com_** _**Disclaimer:** Please use the WifI Spy Cam responsibly and ensure that you respect privacy laws and regulations in your region._

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: A free video series about Lewis and Tolkien
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkddlsjjjq4895g19f7iohhfmm0d0ojonfqpghfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sti60o71c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8q7spbmt49a1q3dm16dvhorhsr0bbbmlpu8s08o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sti60o71c1h2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9kko4nid9qpp5dsvojik2mjh0u6esfp4v6pkvg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sti60o71c1h2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgdqqfvu59skeeh95p5n9r1nmatuaq3356uj5om0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sti60o71c1h2bs)**

---

body:
How do you feel about Trump’s America?

Friend,

With President Trump in the White House and Republican majorities in both Houses of Congress, the state of our nation is getting stronger every single day.

_Our borders are being secured. Illegals are being deported. Government bureaucrats are being held accountable. President Trump 's "Peace through Strength" foreign policy is working once again. And our constitutional rights are secure._

But you wouldn't know that if you listened to the hysterics from the mainstream media.

These radicals are claiming that things have gotten worse since Trump took office!

_It 's vital that we set the record straight as soon as possible - and the only way to do that is to go directly to the millions of Americans who have already felt the impact of President Trump's America First agenda._

That is why we've commissioned our official "2025 State of the Nation" survey to determine how the American people _really_ feel about Trump's America.

**Hearing Protection

A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear, so much so that even a single shot can cause permanent damage without the right [hearing protection.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20317/6374453/a29a95b4492a46d8fb82a89e4be7d31a3a4ee24f/09bb19d526dbb3efd086f6f7e5f4a50fc066d9df) **Depending on the caliber of the firearm, every gunshot registers above the safe hearing DB levels, at which hearing damage can occur quickly.** EarArmor.com's Earmuffs Rated with a Noise Reduction Rating (NRR) of 21, EarArmor offers best-in-class hearing protection from noise levels across all firearm calibers.

**[Order Your Pair of EarArmor.com Earmuffs& Save 50% Off Today!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20317/6374453/a29a95b4492a46d8fb82a89e4be7d31a3a4ee24f/09bb19d526dbb3efd086f6f7e5f4a50fc066d9df)** On Your 6,

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Hundreds of Millions down the drain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Major cuts need to be made

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxNl9FRC1USS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDQzNTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTZfRUQtVEkuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA0MzUwLTI4OTkifQ/zEqGHfuPEWqc3A6rNntZoA)
---
The waste being uncovered at USAID is unacceptable and should be a wake-up call for everyone in government. Seeing millions of tax dollars being wasted on entrenched bureaucrats' pet projects is an insult to the American people, and it's time for a change.

If you don't believe me, here are a few examples.
---
_**• $20 MILLION**_ for Sesame Street in Iraq
**• $2 _MILLION_** for Moroccan pottery classes
**• $2.5 _MILLION_** for electric vehicles in Vietnam
**• $9 _MILLION_** for Syrian civilians, which ended up in a terrorist group's hands
---
Not only is this spending immoral and unsustainable, **but it’s also dangerous.** We CANNOT allow millions of dollars in government funds to end up in the hands of our enemies, and that's exactly what's been happening right under our noses for DECADES.

I’m determined to put an end to this waste, but liberals around the country are fighting us at every turn to keep the endless USAID spending going. **So, Peter, I’m calling on America First patriots like YOU to help.** **[**Will you sign my petition to demand we uncover the waste and fraud in government?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxNl9FRC1USS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDQzNTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTZfRUQtVEkuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA0MzUwLTI4OTkifQ/0WE_B5BCGJrfsq2ApL2n8Q)**

name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: MAGA is Tearing the Country Apart
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wgg3b-v01say-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **MAGA** **is Tearing the Country Apart**
---
|
---
| | | | Hello friend, The political challenges we face right now are unlike anything I’ve encountered in my career. Granted, it’s a brief career compared to the likes of James Carville, who the establishment seems to love, no matter how often he goes on television and criticizes them. It’s ironic, really, but if you dwell on it, you’ll just get a headache and feel confused or discouraged—best to leave that one alone. Still, there are some things we can’t ignore, no matter how much we wish we could. **Our country is being torn apart,** one department at a time. Have you noticed? Not a single meaningful bill is being proposed by the Republican-controlled Congress. It’s as if they’ve forgotten how the government is supposed to work. The only bill they’re floating is a massive tax cut for the people who least need it. **This isn’t a minor tax cut** —it’s a staggering $3.5 trillion giveaway. Naturally, people ask, “How would that even work? Don’t we need that money?” Of course, we do. Their plan is to gut Medicare, Social Security, the Department of Education, and countless other vital institutions that Americans rely on to survive. The greed is endless and ruthless. Trump and his allies have shown complete disdain for the Constitution and the rule of law. As a result, the courts are working overtime to keep up with the flood of lawsuits from across the country. **_We aren’t backing down._** We fully understand the gravity of this moment. While we don’t currently control any branch of government, we have the law—and the people—on our side. America will not go down without a fight. Now is the time for all of us to renew our commitment to **saving our country.** The things we take for granted are being stripped away. But I believe that this period of despair can become the force that unites us as Americans. Republicans, Democrats, Independents—we all want the same basic things: to provide for our families and to live better lives. The stress our government is putting on us is not what any of us signed up for. Donald Trump’s wild, outlandish rhetoric might make for good reality television, but it’s disastrous for diplomacy. World leaders may show him respect to his face because he controls the most powerful military in history, but behind his back, we know what they think of him. It’s the same thing you and I think. He is the epitome of white privilege, yet somehow, he genuinely believes his accomplishments are based on merit. Narcissism knows no bounds with this man—**and yet, here we are.** [**_My goal isn’t to complain to you. It’s to raise awareness, to bring attention to what’s happening, and to share how we’re fighting back—and how you can join us. Make no mistake: this is a fight. It’s a fight for the soul of this nation. Our country has survived two world wars, 9/11, a Great Depression, a Great Recession, COVID, and we will survive Trump, too. But it’s going to take all of us, doing everything we can, playing our roles to the fullest._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wgg3b-v01saz-kyd76rh8/) In Solidarity, Hassan Martini
---

But it doesn't stop there. The next round of confirmation hearings includes a conspiracy theorist, former professional wrestler, AND Project 2025's author himself. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T081c30c3-b3af-4578-b0a5-e792da3c8f3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump is sending all his MAGA loyalists to execute his dangerous right-wing agenda, and it’s becoming a blur. Democrats cannot become complacent for a second. We need to do everything we can to fight back. This means holding nominees accountable during hearings, holding rallies in protest of Trump's yes-men, and going after every wrongdoing this administration commits at the harm of the American people. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/L0aJEDO86OxnsLYcoBj80_VaQ1dWwlvLyDsEAaE-G6Qy4M69RmyD9SeDeLn1UYHfnzDSX54-sRUEHcajPPYaBGLiwt8TPvW7-zCqzYfh7D5lh04RvnfFzbCy2gBBAbWljc4OOSMOrMVCkmcSDf3k3zqnXMD2xC8moGFdys87v4OWsPaKhsuxsdmAa1Bv-fb4wy3Qd1Q1-qeDB6OkW0g1VeYpZrS8Pn23892XgKFXosanC3ViDfdJBKnER_cgqNVlRXO5EchQfSD0m-8PQ9U6A95MKmr-PVVg4UDxwBzmW6wpcoJKxhaWgj2-pq0aBR042N0PKanlJtHWvYppaczgsVY4NhJ2oUhTViJg5Kw9QJmzv2qFnkKk_uAzh7YZ5IeeohBvnk0e2VUgl7cSoOkY5zhL9jIb5ahJXeW3Z2ADXtYiLZ5gzzNX8b5GAjxU_Py21wOmKknntppF3cnyy0-FwZSydcGqSdsJAtaf9rbcLR4/gcxFi1Z7YhJHkkncJIvKLw5bcU8fq7Xv/6)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/eTDx3vibCxnHYAelN7vYbviBIxxJHYGxtlvFCE-6xovVksivXDKPJmTbljFi0_Hod-oEFCCMlF_w0FyTKjT0O_3z_euk-r4pyDTzHCIwikTV9tHx9ReLjtyUatIPa2PywwU6rwINkRbcbRARar5xZaJpyAZWaWC6JuLa02Ajq5-5uA5kql5g-6MweL1N_-6GinGWP-1N0imr-LTC9WqSild_Xc9VHCWPfikUE6394dWDkP9jNJnDz3CpcT00F9vbdXkjG2Io6f-KhRVY62Z9VJDNbc5r85mQKAobpnQpQta09c0EYNMgTK7e5tc-Sx13i-fc9P2b01zUZq1ixG5rAQR5gXuStJFv_fTKsIBrlmwCjO7111IrpL2uEQtNBeICwpynEZATwFMETOlnNYVvo-bAh3sJ4Mha8eyQcCYBhtYJn1Vs1kGTP4l7dZ-JO3KbH3JCvJEQ6ORVAJPKb7zvfnBfba8ABYt1y36vh1IaXvY/qSuAIoggCRiP3lBEgvx5o6_cpeI82w0F/6)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/tGdn4vJHXAi_a-R6Rcao2NZ7hHv9bX6WXHwZdkG3f5yJMIexbh-9ujc20F_WdzsbN5el0XaEpwMO6yR60ZrgmmurrdO-sZ6aCyqYrs4tebnkCIOTslMJPORpURSaXPRVg3IIj-0c8OxzUjjm1BdzAGUB3VfyMocuC2AwnHK8fj1QaMcpzZHj9mf_raWL6WIRN3WKFTYLqIY2PNuOPgLlSYnrSfMoCPwq2WTVi5_kQiYXvRbFZZtQIIeKNUGc5ZLcdlCB6Maw9iD2_S6vNOfzmwppc7vdJ2xnMMQINQkNF44xcBiqlAZiM05-UQ1ehO9px8QmUrSUnrQszt-AT7ZOIklBYqC91Ab8HpB1SAy1eTtlPEICCG9o_KvdoUfuy4Pt0Ur3TFhg9n7SfzaxGbH1FkpgwbdhJR57uX56mHkv4mRqShLJuQjzVyf9hJT6N4v6eGJVO8tqq19HI-C_njpOk3ttaGPPAaI3vDlfKQ3TBkw/gA8VnnYIzh_x5PWULZCQDvaCLY5CM4yw/6)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____

name: The Flyover
subject: Crash Details, a Big Win for USA Hockey, and the Little Blue Dot
body:
The crew of the Army helicopter that collided with an American Airlines jet near Washington, D.C. may have had [inaccurate altitude readings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQhJ_G7ohgwWAKimvS5dorrTWs4z0RsDBKlLc_-fq_Go1GGn36_jyWB3Lm8vyNLwp9qwtImIQEoeySkPN3MWMKGxGQHikop72TepZ23MOqrAWffFLJqmTRE86b08k5dNr6deRwvUlQVimp9HxDMxnwMCeyKlplBiMpca_t9rdy6Ttt-Vvf1G6xvsYc9t6Pc9C_BrgPcMej0Oe8pqu0zjHTAPcPnjuXZ69FFOxcC2aB3I7a-pWx4dZFbHjuovRzFTpRBDvblVajMaGSkbSHOE_OTSrGsYV0fDhnPq0bjHy-kPN_oP6ToHeAfwEAAP__Tktnmw) in the moments before the crash, according to the National Transportation Safety Board.

# Sunday, February 16, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1968, [the first 9-1-1 call in America](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFu7CAQgOHT4G4sZvBiKChe425fm9JiYVgTYbPCaCPfPkr6XOD_pe_jvt59Lvl4_vc7u57qSpJuIAlQr9Hncq3TEF1iJlYDO5yVnaUyUg-bU_bBSSorfTBBW2n1bJA8S9JxNpSG7H5qklAjSlRm9NNtIksmssagcRKT5Jh7beNnzUffOJWrvrmNoe5DcVvvr1Oof4IWQctRuO5prO0paNny2Wu74FFq79wg5XZ2sICAEHwpkE94FR84Qj0g8QNQA1ptBC1Dc_H1lUvJp57FJJ-7z-V32f8ieDv6DgAA__-kh1uJ) was made as a test by the Alabama House speaker to a special rotary phone at the Haleyville, AL., police station, where it was answered: "Hello?" If you have a coffee can full of old pennies tucked away in your attic, now might be a good time for a closer inspection. President Trump's recent decision to halt production of one-cent coins will save more than $85 million, but it could increase the value of the older coins dramatically. Check out this [list of the rarest pennies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL8GNqO7szFk8NAlW7p2RAYfybUGI-yA8vdVund_ek96X7fh5iXKev_0C7syp4GAWgWk0A7BS3wNpg5uZibWNTvs9KUD3YOtH860NlzGXrcjTN3UtfM8oQbUMwIG7sZa3NsGhBYRUPeNN62hC_WBLU4WTWWAg5S0N99J1vLgOb7SwXszpaWO7lHKliv9UdG1out5ns3KZz6Zf95ARdcouagl5aIOH59-jKw2XlfhrMr-XDaVS9qy2vYUnlORtCoC6m1L9e7CdkqMkm1XGbgvXuJftfx34XD0GwAA___kdF-t), some of which are worth millions. We're sponsored today by [BOXAB](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D2PozAQBuBfYzoie_wBFC5Oiuhy7ZXIH0OYk40ROLnLv1-RXW237TyjmVfvn9t0c5Rovf92GW2dywQcdMuhFWaKjtJrUk20MyKgbNCKTg4dlz03zWKHoLGD4KLzQmnlu0HP3mvTRy4CV74he17jIIwQXMj-4pRWMEAf0YhghGKKY6Ra9svfQmtdcE6v8sT9Ekpukl1q3Zj8xWBkMPry3_l0CoOR1ice9QQ5PmqejvLYAzJ5xewoMTDnMGOkR2byujmK7eb2uuJ-LLR9eXB5c3Rf3xvfKHreSi2nzw4EGM5Bdv1gmt3G7R-lRIfpmOL389U7af2puaeFjwAAAP__nkNutA)L, offering an investment opportunity in a new building technology changing the way we build homes.
|
---
## Israeli-American Among Hostages Released by Hamas
The last living Israeli-American hostage was among [the three men released](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQhJ8GOiJ2jcEpKK5xl2uvtDZmifeETYRRTnn7U9L_7YxmPun7c1tuJEWOx2_aOfZcF7Q4GosG_JJIyntxOsXMjDxojhCGa7DDZL3eItOEybu7vecAwC6gZZ_XzHRP4EPWEj9vFsEDWBimC7nR4RWnxB5WD045y0l6bZe_VY6-cS7v-uJ2WeuuS9x6f55q-KVwVjj3jTcp5dMpnJ-1yPpWOMvRuR3UpR5UFM4juABhNBvtdJrGhenk08jZiIsY2rnJSodZP3mWxibxd6hbTM9_UoqcPihnHzvJl6b7T2ZeEf8HAAD__-cqZmQ) by Hamas on Saturday. Hamas released Sagui Dekel Chen, 36, according to the Israeli Defense Forces. All three men were abducted [during the Hamas terrorist attack](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQBb_GdEb2mjNQuEhDd2lTosWsYRMDJ9s5dPn6iPTpnvSk0Wg-7uMdOfK-vONGroRjBAU3qUBqO87I8TU21ewCEZCpyOnW9K0ynbLV6kxvW6_bLky-C4Go872ZggZLrdJTTxW7i6ZAW62VNl2Nza2BHrqZrPZWN6JRNHM5Uv158F5WCvF1PCnV_tiq6NZSHlmYNwGDgOE8z9pPeaczX7-A4ZoChhU3zDIkoizXIxdcKEvcKLHHXXJOSJFlxuWb5UxfFKVfaZcL_qD0hJkCJxIwVMnNj5Nj5Gxb0ahlQ45_KuW_NE8HvwEAAP__qJln2A) on Oct. 7, 2023, from Kibbutz Nir Oz near the border with Gaza, where they lived. Dekel-Chen embraced his wife in [a heartwarming video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1PwzAQxvFPY2-NzpeLXwYPSCgSQ1kZI2OfGyOnqRJT6LdHYe_4PMNP-n-cp3MotVwv72Fh3_I6IeBwAjwpPaVQ6mMimXxmRu4le2V6Z6C3oOXswcWcQrRgs0qZtRk0R_ocnIlEzrEs_tAAlVYKVG-7QAOhQ5tYq6gVCQJOpa1b97WWa5s518d6562L6yKrn1u77aJ_ETgKHH-PV-D49nqsvYX2vQsclXVgQCESGW2tI0C5-XT7KbWWXRtBcFlCqf9me9Z49_gXAAD__6cXTyY) taken Saturday following his release. She gave birth to their third daughter two months after he was seized. As of Saturday, 19 Israeli and five Thai hostages [have been released](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2unTAQBOCnMZ2RvfwXLtLQnbQp0RrWsJGxkW0dcvL0V9z-diN90mg0f17LC9lz2H_jSaa4uICCTiqQul82ZP9Z2mozjgioqcjooZkG1Yyqrw4DyrpmbAntiKuaLDmnpsHZDqa-Uw1VbJ42BbrXWulmrLHtWphg3KjXa69b0SrauMRU_40cykHOf-KbUr3Gs_LmKOXKovklYBYw3_ddB7sGuvPjAuYnPhCT3wTMnt8krY-7gJlzQvLywBOzXAkzOU4kM_8rh9zxP8oj5oI7yStxjoGSzDdeMlORlnYOMq0B9QQwqCqZ7brZe879IFq1n8j-e2L56bK3ga8AAAD__7GKb8o) from Gaza, and more than 1,000 Palestinians have been released from Israeli detention. Hamas killed around 1,200 Israelis and took nearly 250 people captive.
## NTSB Details Potential Causes of Deadly Air Collision
The crew of the Army helicopter that collided with an American Airlines jet near Washington, D.C. may have had [inaccurate altitude readings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQhJ_G7ohgwWAKimvS5dorrTWs4z0RsDBKlLc_-fq_Go1GGn36_jyWB3Lm8vyNLwp9qwtImIQEoeySkPN3MWMKGxGQHikop72TepZ23MOqrAWffFLJqmTRE86b08k5dNr6deRwvUlQVimp9HxDMxnwMCeyKlplBiMpca_t9rdy6Ttt-Vvf1G6xvsYc9t6Pc9C_BrgPcMej0Oe8pqu0zjHTAPcPnjuXZ69FFOxcC2aB3I7a-pWx4dZFbHjuovRzFTpRBDvblVajMaGSkbSHOE_OTSrGsYV0fDhnPq0bjHy-kPN_oP6ToHeAfwEAAP__Tktnmw) in the moments before the crash, according to the National Transportation Safety Board. The recording from the Black Hawk helicopter cockpit also suggested an incomplete radio transmission may have left the crew without critical positioning information just before the crash, in which all 67 aboard the two aircraft were killed. The Black Hawk crew [may have never heard the words](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8N3rDggTEeGLp4S9eOFoHn-DXERBgF5d9Xrrp2O-lO90nf12W5eEq03z79A11d8wICBi6AS7NET-m96C66FRFQdejkqKZRKCtMtzmBAVBbi8NowQywmlEqGwc7wXWaVOjInW8CpJFSSGV7rwcNE9iIRgYjNdMCI9Vc-u9Me91wTe_8wtKH_OiS22p9Hkx9MJgZzK21PlyPHdtx9gzmMzKYY-DP5Hfkofhj49fkw51vvt15KNh4LhHL34L2Fx6Vbr5S3hnMXXHx2SglOszItLg9PKVfev3PxsvBTwAAAP__P3hh1g) "pass behind the" during the transmission from the controller because the helicopter's microphone key was depressed. [Aircraft from all branches of the military](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL_GdEb24hAoXLyGLq-9Ei32kuzJ2BHeC8ffn3L91SPNSPNxm2_IifP9P27kZS0zGLhoA9r2c0RO5-ya6FcioK4hb6_deDXdYPrm4c0Y3LgsK5AhxNEuQwwYOnPBEJZhCQ37t82A7a01thtadBcHIwyReht665QzFFnK3n4WzvKgNZ3lRXsbytYk_xB5VtX9UzApmI7jaNfynemob65g-qoKpkgYE1MVnUvWoWwLit44seB-anwxCpesMQSOlKXqhFX0SbjXZvfxeXBKXPurcua-Iafftvz14uXhJwAA__9xzGP1) have been involved in fatal crashes in the past five years.
## Thousands of Probationary Federal Workers Fired
Thousands of recently hired [federal workers were fired](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyhCAYhJ8GOxz44VALijR0lzalQ-RHyaE4gOf49hnTp9vim92d7-s5Pm2IYZs_7Yq6-jQCgwdlQLkanQ3xGmXjtEcEFA1q3omhY6Jnqlm0E2pyXPROTv7beuUGP6Hik7DAeGd9E_TdxoArzhkXfWvlQ8IAvbsxxSWRDF2oKbc_KWx1QR-v9MbcTmltol5q3QsRHwQMAXOeZ3sUW5Oz1w0QMKWmfBEwG56FgNlTDDVMd7yHCRgGBAyXBEzNx7rT9Sgvuh95RlqXdBS7uUI9Osw20jPlF-ZCfcjoCJiuV0wJOTDWETBN1m4_Q4yhqI5INq82xL-j9T9xbw2_AQAA__9vtW6Q) this week as the Trump administration escalated efforts to cut the federal workforce. The Office of Personnel Management, which serves as a human resources department for the federal government, declined to say how many probationary workers, who generally have less than one year on the job, have so far been dismissed. subject: A free video series about Lewis and Tolkien
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/EFotsYqnMhcATYmFp4SIAvzMoAzUaAPivCGUDNyjpmuHHpL0x6FuZJQcPNW40xSiqL-Vrc7bbPCqWKiAK2eNzGkWImOretpZxtWvHrJH2LcSXxQRpeJxnr0Vg7V9HCXLYeF4BQ_nrC5t97q6bADW0AUnLQNATDcxTZSP88UG21xVmP_25X4nZGhdfVDHzVcoOat7s1iLTyyecG8aYO4h0ydfpP9ydguk4wTwHJ_WQLMEMVjyfH1JHaYqc8GxvbY4fV6zsGlHgww7UQjIT0-p5-DnAG7vhG92-gN6f8Zqddrc34_xXp6soh-91yDrDeWO1PB5_ucN3yOmxhwcfVFvOSw2boXCX9wgcwtCGkVI7AxXNda6a1-8Xzjpf-J3Dc90t-3abJCoRzmYq-LCc1oUnXzMXsgAaH50lNA1PvdOW9pbQfZysurn/W7elbw85NR3H5XtUW0SQWR2DtWx6WK_0/6)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/5_ZkV4ziB5ZZQcj2CIz0LTjy96NgXIPG8SiGJTDEJ_B2Jht3MT54lD5srgwV0ElUPkDBPnZqRLPWRpBAYQE0elWvacRF7jULA-gPSJ0QOzuDI_q5eVEWQBfYwkg3-ey0brYQIk_YaPyMzfbmpNCzWhz4O3vEel9ycRnKhJPA3LKbebOhnq36d4hzuDJJbibBSAkNjyzYmGYgKVUoqMoAC4uamWaZfyqoXNQfEoUaHT9xQ3pPPX6Yywwrw9Bazgykrk0KgryCbGeBrufQWMyfwAcAFOSIQcPal_vyYBGCYcCTI0QkPVdHZwWLX1sqbUHYaXDJAFmzpvUAwbrkxd-TT-fud0G2pDxZj1vHyMmgiN8ZnHkwPnWb4IVW1ggxTSJsC7VJBQMq4eooYB8PGP3IsMCulrr_1Ka8zxRvpS1VxYpMBUFaUVYf/-X4ugUqaWjG9SmYpt45GV_cOX7E1d7u8/6)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/Q-9D-tDL0SiSFrB-B2hUnIU-SNtwXVvSfeboQBDiOoz1PMkgzx5m6zYLh1PNJuHCIzzrvhQgpDTXOQA1wPvThk9buagXL68pk930CNWG3ij2e_zJ1CtTurhl3ga_2ukPrA7iit-z4rlyI_dGn3j8pUHQ37galYls7aJSKM6jCAvof8UYR0VpS8HonAkoDLacPHKpD6tyKnYV7k_ouqyoj8JJPTmpvCV3DnRC6VrQ77VX-5WNTQInSHY5PEZiVUXwk-A_Lw1-51cgQxiiyYJ2n5rJhtZj_3gZt1S_CcKnmCVHcVSBRTrqpQg81BA0IDaiUBs5CnvgTQyq8bDOSxcPoomhQbfCtaryoBGLxCdCt1VbgZWOQG-weoZQQBpmVVDUnX3AnDdABeacbwuxIa9njDXZu-8UaG0PZO1SNST12lOSBRhdFOxo/w0-hneKN5lAlzPki_A9ON1gW8H9PC5vi/6)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/wrl7ajdhHFgU7tV-9BuDf-7jYt7ZTI0dpFktaTib26F8KEVDqCaShUS0dvyikksElkzTwKrGKefY9IbRQs8xRP7xQj1jgbUHBs-01GqcnchUJl8wU_dBAXkYj5G8ZWuVK4Dz1h317hI-EIsl3n5GznEpoIl3YPaAna61QhBnTd9fdu4WjvZSaSq7-vcCpJYm_VISTJgrQjEN0IObNzh4O1Sb6Gtm939QDXy4kQIC-wntPpRl6zHC3XM7ho8xHzeZo3MEDbdksgBLcEQiYyUWReYD_Bw8ydKJPdEzV9g5kf0iQjdPXiScOjvqgliib-SbnAY2ggGEa7soMc1_iGo8NfUmmfEsWYpe1-8hyhRjwHWhhLwyVEWvcNS9mJaxkc5dJE-5qXNHqyyAjvCtUjccl6ESnvsT4OmU_VzGRB_lz7xS5NtjHCNw/2ujZ6HH4g8P-Gl6KyNfHPx1P9F_QlOgi/6)**

Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: A free video series about Lewis and Tolkien
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80da6ff020474c4fb80294a3e98584f0&_e=IoWrI4Qm6xxIiTmU5V5hYwMj2SKyNiQkHueIXVgZXIXp6LVfYcLWjxXvfB1JmVnDVt5l9UsCtbYkUlmW1veIRPmu_m6ekk5XNVgAnYz4oQIW7LXccjMtv2CqaOtwoF8MDPiDDIBL3Ky89qy9zRYOttlrpGdPcjFTBW6QJmbSD_OLraYK0Nb8rUzXf6fzE55tsUtSOZObucT_mswjCz0ZwmHaUUgsy1WjqP7DWaZ25nz-EZjADDPJN0GiB8Bva65RsWt1cDtD6s-1xknXRVh5P2u4ZZDEFhSLI8s7pV9WQ-wP-1oGXZhoGVnDFK0TTEkX7HZTmC9J1uY5yPsFBmtttq5VRkMM6ujJq2CwAgksm-QNU2IAnfMfa0GxD4juSZBW)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80da6ff020474c4fb80294a3e98584f0&_e=IoWrI4Qm6xxIiTmU5V5hYwMj2SKyNiQkHueIXVgZXIXp6LVfYcLWjxXvfB1JmVnDVt5l9UsCtbYkUlmW1veIRPmu_m6ekk5XNVgAnYz4oQIW7LXccjMtv2CqaOtwoF8MDPiDDIBL3Ky89qy9zRYOttlrpGdPcjFTBW6QJmbSD_OLraYK0Nb8rUzXf6fzE55tsUtSOZObucT_mswjCz0ZwmHaUUgsy1WjqP7DWaZ25nyeiv5A3itsO17hJg1h-Z_dclSo7hQq6FxG3EnayO1Y7USrrYBLbR4PiP0BDA430wt0wTHaYcj9A7RY9e_Z-IG-xDj85Y2q_L5S1vLnR1WksbkC4gI_UFdX8c_kR9HHGkR9Q5iFgL5NtTicfcWAi7Ok)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80da6ff020474c4fb80294a3e98584f0&_e=IoWrI4Qm6xxIiTmU5V5hYwMj2SKyNiQkHueIXVgZXIXp6LVfYcLWjxXvfB1JmVnDVt5l9UsCtbYkUlmW1veIRPmu_m6ekk5XNVgAnYz4oQIW7LXccjMtv2CqaOtwoF8MDPiDDIBL3Ky89qy9zRYOttlrpGdPcjFTBW6QJmbSD_OLraYK0Nb8rUzXf6fzE55tsUtSOZObucT_mswjCz0ZwmHaUUgsy1WjqP7DWaZ25nx_E5eU4OJ7k2b6RMUPNQFk8cJ6cSXqMs6CqF9arS2m9FQSm-QIkXguigR-93hOOsddaP8Fjb93PWgxQcxKetx2fi_ib0pUkAba0KZTw72iiuiKHZwKRjvliVJQ9n1jpWbgCaKHYojwXWAZiQVhYxUm)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80da6ff020474c4fb80294a3e98584f0&_e=IoWrI4Qm6xxIiTmU5V5hYwMj2SKyNiQkHueIXVgZXIXp6LVfYcLWjxXvfB1JmVnDVt5l9UsCtbYkUlmW1veIRPmu_m6ekk5XNVgAnYz4oQIW7LXccjMtv2CqaOtwoF8MDPiDDIBL3Ky89qy9zRYOttlrpGdPcjFTBW6QJmbSD_OLraYK0Nb8rUzXf6fzE55tsUtSOZObucT_mswjCz0ZwmHaUUgsy1WjqP7DWaZ25nyoiLAkL4PQUnlXoNYwWmQUmjPEspX-MqtJ-goeZjKFhyKbKlxnKGKTqGnO973FL45yogNXkiaHY_gNyP4FSwMAtwwYkeF4h3Rpws_LI8OgLUDnxc2Qcxj_nSn6sjwto5SGozzbvvzoacgjpULOLc5-)**

You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series: Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture." The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth. That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings. Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College. You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link: - | | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: History Facts
subject: The Dutch and English went to war over this item
body:
While nutmeg today is a common kitchen spice used to jazz up vegetables or top holiday favorites [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68docrl8xl1r1874n46myquqfyhinyxahmvhfkpbtru55hde68iqaqxybl55gyuya0wkkg9lxfxs21v3gr4xtvju93g2l9jmsxmb4aucdyuv68pyzp95mvamtk7ugnmqo6szcsbf4xchvysp4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The Dutch and English spent years warring over nutmeg.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hile nutmeg today is a common kitchen spice used to jazz up vegetables or top holiday favorites such as pumpkin pie and eggnog, it was once also highly valued for its [medicinal properties](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and its alleged power to ward off the Black Plague. As such, the Banda Islands of Indonesia, which were flush with nutmeg trees, became a prime target of European business interests in the Late Middle Ages.
---
By the beginning of the 17th century, members of the Dutch East India Company (VOC) [arranged](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=2wjxy76qd8xdkjebd98ibx1823id15w09xcyahipq7niahtxye6voge0ov4sc8wpcetq6ffw1jevtwkb49dumh8cpg6x47o3vve2m6zqv84sany0saz8q2o9j8njxm044nlbaf6bp4wysfc3j44mc59ne451v567kf18dexdk0uc7e6t4l4f7h9v4gs2jnum87s5ms86ysqqd7osau2vmujjsgq6kymf2kkgqmjw9lr4l4qp2xjbo6pskbergzjp758bdd5zyt6wpwhl4a0sfwtkxg1p90&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) what they thought were exclusive trade agreements with several Banda chiefs. However, many of the Banda continued dealing their valuable wares to other buyers, including those from the English East India Company (EIC). Although the Dutch mainly channeled their hostility over this toward the Banda instead of the EIC, the two European powers threatened each other until forging a treaty that ostensibly shared control of the islands in 1619. But the treaty failed to diffuse tensions, as the Dutch continued their aggressive behavior in the region, including a brutal massacre of much of the Indigenous population in 1621, while extorting extra funds from the English for protection and administration of the islands.
As the tensions boiled over, the “nutmeg wars,” as they are sometimes known, also produced an interesting geopolitical development that became far more relevant the following century. As part of the Treaty of Breda, which ended the second Anglo-Dutch War in 1667, the English agreed to officially transfer ownership of what remained of their holdings in the Banda Islands, while the Dutch ceded formal control of New Netherland, a little-used territory across the Atlantic Ocean that [included modern-day New York City](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## A pig nearly started a war between the U.S. and Great Britain.
In the 1850s, a mix of American settlers and British employees of the Hudson’s Bay Company lived in an [uneasy truce](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srryqa&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) on San Juan Island, one of a string of islands that were disputed territory between Britain's Vancouver Island and the mainland U.S. That truce was shaken in June 1859 when an American farmer named Lyman Cutlar shot and killed a Hudson’s Bay-owned pig that had been rooting around his property. Cutlar’s attempt to compensate the company was rebuffed, and after an angry mob threatened him with retribution, a U.S. Army garrison led by future Confederate officer George Edward Pickett was sent to San Juan Island to assert American authority. That, in turn, prompted the arrival of a pair of British warships, and then three more after additional American troops turned up. It required the negotiation capabilities of U.S. Army Commanding General Winfield Scott to de-escalate the situation that autumn. Thirteen years later, an independent arbitration commission awarded San Juan Island to the United States, ending the chances of a global conflict over farm animals in the area.

By the beginning of the 17th century, members of the Dutch East India Company (VOC) what they thought were exclusive trade agreements with several Banda chiefs. However, many of the Banda continued dealing their valuable wares to other buyers, including those from the English East India Company (EIC). Although the Dutch mainly channeled their hostility over this toward the Banda instead of the EIC, the two European powers threatened each other until forging a treaty that ostensibly shared control of the islands in 1619. But the treaty failed to diffuse tensions, as the Dutch continued their aggressive behavior in the region, including a brutal massacre of much of the Indigenous population in 1621, while extorting extra funds from the English for protection and administration of the islands. As the tensions boiled over, the “nutmeg wars,” as they are sometimes known, also produced an interesting geopolitical development that became far more relevant the following century. As part of the Treaty of Breda, which ended the second Anglo-Dutch War in 1667, the English agreed to officially transfer ownership of what remained of their holdings in the Banda Islands, while the Dutch ceded formal control of New Netherland, a little-used territory across the Atlantic Ocean that . | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Islands comprising the Banda Islands 11 | | Calories in 1 teaspoon of nutmeg 12 | Calories in 1 teaspoon of nutmeg 12 | | Height (in feet) reached by a fully grown nutmeg tree 65 | | Tons of nutmeg imported by the European Union in 2022 5,732 | Tons of nutmeg imported by the European Union in 2022 5,732 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- A pig nearly started a war between the U.S. and Great Britain. In the 1850s, a mix of American settlers and British employees of the Hudson’s Bay Company lived in an on San Juan Island, one of a string of islands that were disputed territory between Britain's Vancouver Island and the mainland U.S. That truce was shaken in June 1859 when an American farmer named Lyman Cutlar shot and killed a Hudson’s Bay-owned pig that had been rooting around his property. Cutlar’s attempt to compensate the company was rebuffed, and after an angry mob threatened him with retribution, a U.S. Army garrison led by future Confederate officer George Edward Pickett was sent to San Juan Island to assert American authority. That, in turn, prompted the arrival of a pair of British warships, and then three more after additional American troops turned up. It required the negotiation capabilities of U.S. Army Commanding General Winfield Scott to de-escalate the situation that autumn. Thirteen years later, an independent arbitration commission awarded San Juan Island to the United States, ending the chances of a global conflict over farm animals in the area. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/IuL_Rcl9s6l8st8uofCLH_W61_AAuqS2B97aKfWj1sTZiGvK5JMx9smunCIck4AFtUcK0SaSdbh1Hqc1SKmsBsUN5lDlcAZSHzrtk7wolHmVRA_FDc9Puakil-KuP5i_B4RiOEqeB36DL2pOeonyyLjNK_-q-O7ZluDehFewkoWIBKSeEwgLxOj4r5PBp1RF1UGCLqvSKqrEv47DfY_dDxdr4rogKvUBLP7_4pol7eY10eug04XMVxNBCgv3H7BK2k8F1JTk1hxUKjCwytCO3xh_XDTKf5OuzHuYVTAjSZMID88Ne5QNdHzlCiK960PaSL8Q00CqzWdEvw2P3g_ym27CHf1eEEwnzZzkKkzvfShfvJckkFUNwcSOHIWpKnpTVwe8t1amx8IFC_Dea39CdXKopTcOQUvLyijuP_2JK4AxLZecmqc4VqxBkc-BBGi7ypyh1DwQqnU1oB38z21EqFngW7FdqHo--WmmZlsXsaI/mHbmwTj2lBJnwT9lGXfJvobQWAJ25he2/6)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
