name: The LaRouche Organization
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
Organize for a Movement Based on Reason

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=1)
---
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFkLDKuqUBL8ogeU8okNPbsBEC8zRSjN2zclqRP5GhsJd&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=2 "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST") [LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFkLDKuqUBL8ogeU8okNPbsBEC8zRSjN2zclqRP5GhsJd&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=2)
---
Friend –
The world today is rife with a multitude of dangers. Though there are very hopeful signs that President Trump is moving to resolve the conflict in Ukraine, the situation in Gaza and Southwest Asia as a whole remain very tense, and could easily explode. In her [remarks to the International Peace Coalition](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PIoIPCCZWC6j7cUIUdw16behd_Tjqu4s2r4MSE_CkL5z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=3) last week, career stateswoman Her Excellency Naledi Pandor of South Africa noted that "it is a very dangerous time, because we are speaking through headlines, rather than through rationality." Therefore, she said: "We need leadership. We need to find a way, through the Schiller Institute, of identifying who are the 'adults in the room.' Who can actually live without being on a headline everyday? Who is ready to engage in a serious fashion to actually settle the matters of the world?”
Indeed, this is the task of today.
Initiator of the International Peace Coalition and founder of the Schiller Institute, Helga Zepp-LaRouche, emphasized recently that “we need a cultural Renaissance, because it’s never technology which does good or bad or evil. It is always man who brings these technologies to a good use or an evil use.” She identified that the “idea that mankind is the creative species must become the true identity of our species.” And she advises us to "start with a definition of what are the common aims of that human species, where do... we want this human race to be in 1,000 years, or in 10,000 years?”
We, citizens, are urged to focus upon the leadership role of Nicholas of Cusa—the founder of the modern nation-state and modern science in the Fifteenth Century, who Zepp- LaRouche said “enunciated an important principle: that the only reason that nations and cultures are able to communicate, is that each of them produces scientists, artists, musicians, and other people who believe in universal principles... because they are everywhere...” which defines why they’re called “universal.”
The LaRouche Organization has been spearheading this effort. Last week, our organizing teams talked to citizens across the country. We also lobbied Congressional offices on Capitol Hill—particularly to demand the confirmation of Tulsi Gabbard as Director of National Intelligence. These efforts have nudged the world toward an “adults in the room” approach, able to take charge of resolving the world’s crises.
Did you perhaps mobilize with other citizens nationwide? What effect was generated by the vocal denunciations from Southwest Asian nations in opposition to the insane mafia-style, Palestinian-removal scheme of Trump and global Zionist elements? These words of sanity coupled with international endorsements of the [LaRouche Oasis Plan](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNGkyf-6bftPvBP4skQiOHZyiq_-5S0ZdXIyx-ovaHeFw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=4) are urgently needed to steer an extremely precarious situation toward negotiations rather than increased bloodletting.
Finally, the beginning of a much-needed dialogue between Russia’s President Vladimir Putin and U.S. President Donald Trump occurred. These developments put the world on an improved footing, moving away from war. Help us organize to put solutions on the table. Organize forums and discussion groups around the "[Ten Principles for a New Security and Development Architecture](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-27vZ7bAAmP821BtXamCEW9n-wG8kxHkUJuWYWqXBAhbkqHnvIFs_CsYAwXSx3mNXxX3-O5hCpMLoKkb2nDMmXhOpoTYWk3YgRV8NSuwPjkG8mrHt_s-4JZSIXV6b2QM9YPgZw41FMxSquwblP6DmDk&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=5).," and increase the available "adults in the room."
* * *
## Starting At 10am EST! "The Middle East as a Strategic Crossroads"
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFkLDKuqUBL8ogeU8okNPbsBEC8zRSjN2zclqRP5GhsJd&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=6)
In 2002, the American statesman and physical economist Lyndon LaRouche addressed an audience gathered at the Zayed Center in Abu Dhabi on “The Role of Oil and Gas in World Politics.” Alongside the UAE's oil minister and Iraq's former oil minister, LaRouche focused on the critical question of confronting the real enemy of the peoples in that region, namely the lack of fresh water and increasing desertification.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFkLDKuqUBL8ogeU8okNPbsBEC8zRSjN2zclqRP5GhsJd&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=7)
* * *
## International Peace Coalition: Ending the Cycle of Violence in Southwest Asia Requires Creating a Future for All its Inhabitants
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PIoIPCCZWC6j7cUIUdw16behd_Tjqu4s2r4MSE_CkL5z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=8)
Last week, the LaRouche movement along with the International Peace Coalition hosted an exceptional event featuring Naledi Pandor, former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation in South Africa. Dr. Pandor discussed the great need to find "adults in the room" across the world today if we are to traverse the difficult challenges we face.
In addition, Dr. Pandor gave her full endorsement of the LaRouche Oasis Plan for Southwest Asia, calling it "a set of very useful proposals that could be looked at by groupings that are in contention as the basis for further discussion." But beyond that, she called on people to become committed to the highest ideals of mankind in order to help lift the world out of its divided and dangerous state.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PIoIPCCZWC6j7cUIUdw16behd_Tjqu4s2r4MSE_CkL5z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=9)
* * *
## Battle Report: Recruiting the World to LaRouche's Physical Economic Solutions
Tune in for a weekly update on the LaRouche movement's activities taking place around the world. LaRouche's ideas are taking off! and are being featured all over. This week, hear from organizers in the United States and Mexico, as well as a rundown of the work for the Oasis Plan in Southwest Asia.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNeJiKBbBb1YvKKlOKVPAVhHhehv4JFHPvTjcbKvxc6SIC8ee-pSptIfA3uIOQCEq8KoAdNsPMQW_mstDzE9CP3b6-suq4JYpoBGc3JrXgDOTxhWB17xyzfE7k7uumNlQ8&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=10)
* * *
## Friday Symposium: BlackRock's War Against the Nation State
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFuIT5u29ex6AkfEiWmJH2k0nVxqhsriWW6aH-Oil4T0r&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=11)
At the Federal Reserve's annual Jackson Hole Economic Symposium in August 2019, both Bank of England head Mark Carney and BlackRock CEO Larry Fink asserted a chilling plan for the London-Wall Street financial giants and the banks they partner with to effectively end the power of nation states to control their own finances and budgets. The policy amounted to a “proposed” global dictatorship over the economic policy of otherwise duly elected, sovereign nations.
Will the new Trump administration in Washington, D.C., which has openly declared its hostility to financial "waste" and forever wars, now finally pull the plug on Blackrock, et al. and re-establish actual national sovereignty?
Tune in for this week's Symposium with TLO President Diane Sare and EIR economics expert Richard Freeman.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNeJiKBbBb1YvKKlOKVPAVh4W590S9eK-7N4lJ1KsEPHckCnXUmCoczLWUyiPn05-9Q8dgX9cSpvyPybSFPJO5SvD9DBG5TUaH8PHd7VMczGw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240216_newsletter&n=12)
* * *

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
From skeptic to believer

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df92b45ad4bd40129f9a07a903e0fb76&_e=OmhotCVMjVYxPl6e6pE2gw0uQtlyHrpS1U0y0bYZXZrmQsO7l9zcKJCQAvgfdtTmjo6glQuG03PE1S1wIAulD47JoHN5dsL8GJ1RscyiYA5OnVCzTTQG8BOSAlp6edj5KHvSQNayONGOl0_uuYRZIPAF-uUcnYt0bclb2sZGLsrgHH5nkViabyPkgNn4oPFSqqSF6FkVStwjIZHtJGQDcEnsko3-aPliOsexNh3qdlKKosTWkoeQj1UPVY7sALBNfQRe-MZSxn3wqKZQLMYzwSNpiCa-83xycm-0oAyCrKQuTSZP7SEuuPvQn4ZBJ6ybgoDswAcdBzEfBZsg6Je7dhSzyNMeFKk_tRLy1Gc3yM1P6C2lTzyHPXjbQYbYH5nqVkDJ30XuZRDbhImA9ghNTEnZ-NcEibUXiqbAzTN-gMX05Dlwt529Kg6pLkEeU_si)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df92b45ad4bd40129f9a07a903e0fb76&_e=OmhotCVMjVYxPl6e6pE2gw0uQtlyHrpS1U0y0bYZXZrmQsO7l9zcKJCQAvgfdtTmjo6glQuG03PE1S1wIAulD47JoHN5dsL8GJ1RscyiYA5OnVCzTTQG8BOSAlp6edj5KHvSQNayONGOl0_uuYRZIPAF-uUcnYt0bclb2sZGLsrgHH5nkViabyPkgNn4oPFSqqSF6FkVStwjIZHtJGQDcEnsko3-aPliOsexNh3qdlKKosTWkoeQj1UPVY7sALBNfQRe-MZSxn3wqKZQLMYzwV_f4ZzjiAsYFW1cGIMRbJnCcVvULY1reoHabq4WtTD5TVZhCLtUXRYWVnNw9bHpn-ScEdKWSFFTCPbPl9quuIBgWXhXJcvotZO0DTxJTPQejnT_2z-wUsUQhTraTSTjRQyotTjbCbJOYAf_NpxPkvAZupbGlmFpn2PH2nSWpALv)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df92b45ad4bd40129f9a07a903e0fb76&_e=OmhotCVMjVYxPl6e6pE2gw0uQtlyHrpS1U0y0bYZXZrmQsO7l9zcKJCQAvgfdtTmjo6glQuG03PE1S1wIAulD47JoHN5dsL8GJ1RscyiYA5OnVCzTTQG8BOSAlp6edj5KHvSQNayONGOl0_uuYRZIPAF-uUcnYt0bclb2sZGLsrgHH5nkViabyPkgNn4oPFSqqSF6FkVStwjIZHtJGQDcEnsko3-aPliOsexNh3qdlKKosTWkoeQj1UPVY7sALBNfQRe-MZSxn3wqKZQLMYzwU_1BxIcUZLvq6mxdSZ2sAO6Hd5wz4hW-hleKcGw9AqKhvmpfI-me4M7ddUNFpXpBQit4Q9-SF0nnjP-JWUmmqREwr3kw3Z1NEeKhDlZZD2Qgfy8jeu3VTO8mmERqVJcxLjt8v5EiZcxWnH79eIhFRVArox9PBNK8o4i3dhR_9O1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df92b45ad4bd40129f9a07a903e0fb76&_e=OmhotCVMjVYxPl6e6pE2gw0uQtlyHrpS1U0y0bYZXZrmQsO7l9zcKJCQAvgfdtTmjo6glQuG03PE1S1wIAulD47JoHN5dsL8GJ1RscyiYA5OnVCzTTQG8BOSAlp6edj5KHvSQNayONGOl0_uuYRZIPAF-uUcnYt0bclb2sZGLsrgHH5nkViabyPkgNn4oPFSqqSF6FkVStwjIZHtJGQDcEnsko3-aPliOsexNh3qdlKKosTWkoeQj1UPVY7sALBNfQRe-MZSxn3wqKZQLMYzwfm7w2dUDS7SRCZKEpmb9CSRqdCWUcoCYybBtLKPNpNEHqQoAezz7W80FdsKkDpZErwhqMw3QnJ54blYkaR7Hf-O5pOpbWyI_uRxGpjoli1D2NS0l7Ei0XUSa0pCHu92CBoEEkZoGB5ZF8vsIyc_PxzcciuRfVHapXrrm6tqwhHX).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=df92b45ad4bd40129f9a07a903e0fb76&_t=V2zCRKJsON61YVKmHo7OEd5wLT8-bXkv9iZ1qfPuKhKjcTEjq4c3W_uAlmlne8G9asxfJln2z9LuDUa98MgWu-b9vZzERprP-UUzNy6FphPvmcUwyJa8Ri2DW-dYMzjU)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Shapiro claims win, but most kids fail math
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3d8f0e2b04&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Shapiro boasts of education improvements while most students are not proficient in math](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5f2943f706&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
The state of Pennsylvania spent[ $16.8 billion](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7d65a2ea12&e=b7b3eddce2) last year to fund public education, and the return on investment is abysmal. In 2024, 53 percent of students were proficient in reading and writing, while only 40 percent were proficient in math. Last year, we conducted[ an in-depth analysis](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=96ecc4a8ef&e=b7b3eddce2) of fourteen school districts in Southeastern Pennsylvania and came to the conclusion that it will take more than money to solve our education crisis in the Commonwealth. This year’s analysis yields strikingly similar conclusions after researching the same fourteen districts, comparing 2024 test scores in reading and math against starting teacher salaries. Public school students in grades three through eight take the Pennsylvania System of Student Assessment ([PSSA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=005dc4b4ee&e=b7b3eddce2)) every year which includes English Language Arts (ELA) and Math. **Why It Matters.** Notably absent from his address was any mention of academic achievement and outcomes for Pennsylvania public school students. There were no talking points about how the increased funding will have any bearing on reading and math skills for those students who are not proficient. Teacher compensation does not appear to be related to academic performance. Second, Pennsylvania is a large, diverse state, composed of urban, rural, and suburban areas. The cost of living in Southeastern Pennsylvania is vastly different from the rural areas of the state. A blanket starting salary assumption makes no sense.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c5cff42c87&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Not so fast — violent crime is up even as murders are down](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f2a6bacdf0&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Ben Mannes_
Philadelphia’s local politicians took a victory lap in the media, touting stats that the city’s 2024[ homicide rate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6642d4f086&e=b7b3eddce2) dropped to the lowest point it has been in a decade. The media has covered this as a decrease in violent crime, noting[ the largest drop in gun violence of all major U.S. cities](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4d63491f46&e=b7b3eddce2) but is the 50 percent drop in murders from three years ago due to increasing public safety, or better medicine at the city’s hospitals? In the press, Krasner touted his[ funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bcef684a36&e=b7b3eddce2) of nonprofit anti-violence groups across the city for their work to help prevent crime. “We’re talking about sparing a life every day, every day because of the incredibly important work that is done at many different levels with prevention, with enforcement,”[ Krasner](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6e908c2ae3&e=b7b3eddce2) said Monday, Dec. 30, 2024. “That, frankly, is a surprise all by itself because we’re the brokest to the ten largest cities,” continued Krasner. In the first month and a half of 2025, the downward trend in murders continues with 22 homicides YTD, showing a 35 percent decrease. However, despite the drop in murder statistics, there have been more than 1,281 nonfatal violent crimes reported by police so far this year, nearly a 49 percent increase. So what explains this sharp contrast? **Why It Matters.** In Philadelphia, recent crime statistics illustrate this phenomenon. As of February 6, 2025, the city reported 22 homicides, reflecting an 18.52 percent year-to-date decrease. However, during the same period, total violent crimes increased by 48.13 percent, with 1,151 incidents reported. This disparity indicates that while fewer violent encounters are resulting in death, the overall occurrence of violent incidents has risen. The shift presents a complex challenge. The reduction in homicide rates may create a false sense of security, leading the public and policymakers to believe that violent crime is decreasing overall. In reality, the[ prevalence](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3128c3fe33&e=b7b3eddce2) of violent incidents remains high, but the outcomes have changed due to medical interventions.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a149dd7d95&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Yes, America, there is a swamp](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=51a3aacdb1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* [Andy Bloom: Stuck in the middle](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ba3c922f28&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [Kyle Sammin: The Eagles are flying high. Will the city join them?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5af1a88d5f&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [Richard Koenig: Mary Gay Scanlon flails against the Musk bogeyman](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c7d4f7182b&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [Rutledge Mayor asks Delaware County Council to consider universal basic income](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a2478044e9&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [Rep. Seth Grove: Government waste is no accident](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2ae3a0c3bf&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [Thom Nickels: Where do dead journalists go?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=491ca8a18c&e=b7b3eddce2)

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
Dems in disarray? Has the opposition party learned all the wrong lessons from their 2024 defeat? Are they doomed and in danger of long-term irrelevance? Veteran journalist Joe Klein seems to think so. As the _Primary Colors_ author [asked on his Substack](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4f545df737&e=b7b3eddce2) this week, “Can this party be saved? I have my doubts. The intellectual corrosion is comprehensive; it is only matched by the self-righteous arrogance.” As Klein concedes and all long-term observers of the scene must admit, the Democratic Party is not going to fall apart and die. But if they want to win elections, they ought to start thinking, talking, and acting like the average voter again.
---
|
---

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

By Ben Mannes Philadelphia’s local politicians took a victory lap in the media, touting stats that the city’s 2024 dropped to the lowest point it has been in a decade. The media has covered this as a decrease in violent crime, noting but is the 50 percent drop in murders from three years ago due to increasing public safety, or better medicine at the city’s hospitals? In the press, Krasner touted his of nonprofit anti-violence groups across the city for their work to help prevent crime. “We’re talking about sparing a life every day, every day because of the incredibly important work that is done at many different levels with prevention, with enforcement,” said Monday, Dec. 30, 2024. “That, frankly, is a surprise all by itself because we’re the brokest to the ten largest cities,” continued Krasner. In the first month and a half of 2025, the downward trend in murders continues with 22 homicides YTD, showing a 35 percent decrease. However, despite the drop in murder statistics, there have been more than 1,281 nonfatal violent crimes reported by police so far this year, nearly a 49 percent increase. So what explains this sharp contrast? Why It Matters. In Philadelphia, recent crime statistics illustrate this phenomenon. As of February 6, 2025, the city reported 22 homicides, reflecting an 18.52 percent year-to-date decrease. However, during the same period, total violent crimes increased by 48.13 percent, with 1,151 incidents reported. This disparity indicates that while fewer violent encounters are resulting in death, the overall occurrence of violent incidents has risen. The shift presents a complex challenge. The reduction in homicide rates may create a false sense of security, leading the public and policymakers to believe that violent crime is decreasing overall. In reality, the of violent incidents remains high, but the outcomes have changed due to medical interventions. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. What we're reading Dems in disarray? Has the opposition party learned all the wrong lessons from their 2024 defeat? Are they doomed and in danger of long-term irrelevance? Veteran journalist Joe Klein seems to think so. As the Primary Colors author this week, “Can this party be saved? I have my doubts. The intellectual corrosion is comprehensive; it is only matched by the self-righteous arrogance.” As Klein concedes and all long-term observers of the scene must admit, the Democratic Party is not going to fall apart and die. But if they want to win elections, they ought to start thinking, talking, and acting like the average voter again. | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. name: Jimmy Patronis [FL-01 Special Election GOP Nominee]
subject: I’m now OFFICIALLY the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I look forward to fighting for the America First values that you, me, President Trump, Leader Scalise, and Matt Gaetz believe in.
I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.
| |
---
| | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis.

**As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.** I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election...

House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.

That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda.

**_[If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ce62518eee8423cbce4abfd81ce608b&_e=dzt1DxLY9YY5-ys7t2npvjkGViR24YBD00RSxTM2WDoGMamLasZGZWOqo5Q3ILq2EjwqXkfP1WC38GC1fH4adIuL8VJeKCp1HqvFCDNIPrneK6zL9goomkVrALnPDOZmjfWoX2mCAgT8iaP5ty2hbhP_GaVOKjD-Zj_YbZYpFN3n7mw8S7kh4f_AD3y_2IQmS5YEWl2-zkuK0LiA5k9Z5KO5tlg47Kguq7jw6CwBaNvdUfxO7ueNOGVeXzq6Do_S3QeLm8-2PD7aAe4Mq8sC2aiktJewUtRa1x7soQ2RApJagGUUespMJsaVP0A-VFp_eRHgK0Aozx5bOehbPy2TR_nL4P4UJTFaxjLu99zEKJpolCUhea6b6tRXdlFmfiJnKngWBpt3GrKx1F8irD854gGfvHPq8mNsQSSHi2vd_fk%3D "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. ")_**

_Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? _
---
**[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ce62518eee8423cbce4abfd81ce608b&_e=dzt1DxLY9YY5-ys7t2npvjkGViR24YBD00RSxTM2WDoGMamLasZGZWOqo5Q3ILq2EjwqXkfP1WC38GC1fH4adIuL8VJeKCp1HqvFCDNIPrneK6zL9goomkVrALnPDOZmjfWoX2mCAgT8iaP5ty2hbhP_GaVOKjD-Zj_YbZYpFN3n7mw8S7kh4f_AD3y_2IQmS5YEWl2-zkuK0LiA5k9Z5KO5tlg47Kguq7jw6CwBaNvdUfxO7ueNOGVeXzq6Do_S3QeLm8-2PD7aAe4Mq8sC2TdigaSgW3IhAPbQBla5xDsE2uPOYMLTY763iMx68L1wlHACzOrSuCUUsD0HwB10xqxMS_mNxY6K1u1FHtdkmdMUTXijEaf6WlC3QhkWpYpoUHQ1urosh3WX-5SEXfMacXv6lnJTNsg438H38EpAw2w%3D)[**YES >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ce62518eee8423cbce4abfd81ce608b&_e=dzt1DxLY9YY5-ys7t2npvjkGViR24YBD00RSxTM2WDoGMamLasZGZWOqo5Q3ILq2EjwqXkfP1WC38GC1fH4adIuL8VJeKCp1HqvFCDNIPrneK6zL9goomkVrALnPDOZmjfWoX2mCAgT8iaP5ty2hbhP_GaVOKjD-Zj_YbZYpFN3n7mw8S7kh4f_AD3y_2IQmS5YEWl2-zkuK0LiA5k9Z5KO5tlg47Kguq7jw6CwBaNvdUfxO7ueNOGVeXzq6Do_S3QeLm8-2PD7aAe4Mq8sC2b6lPT567NmYZHZhvT9ONbN6ODLS5tap3ZzYqwTWlzwZ1tsum3lYtjqT5m5R50DtlhUhR-VCBEywFYiwQ0lhEu_9GCv40cAWYF6kmlErSbJPRreKimyFat0jshzR49z9mFgzhx6jTJP04riqfycvm_s%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ce62518eee8423cbce4abfd81ce608b&_e=dzt1DxLY9YY5-ys7t2npvjkGViR24YBD00RSxTM2WDoGMamLasZGZWOqo5Q3ILq2EjwqXkfP1WC38GC1fH4adIuL8VJeKCp1HqvFCDNIPrneK6zL9goomkVrALnPDOZmjfWoX2mCAgT8iaP5ty2hbhP_GaVOKjD-Zj_YbZYpFN3n7mw8S7kh4f_AD3y_2IQmS5YEWl2-zkuK0LiA5k9Z5KO5tlg47Kguq7jw6CwBaNvdUfxO7ueNOGVeXzq6Do_S3QeLm8-2PD7aAe4Mq8sC2b3-InNgaMSdRksW4n0qpSRUU9RuzSoYf6gbijCVV2gvzdcLwU96uZw5FD_Jw120B4zOS0F_9anPpUsPhXWme3hVooOuYPNNgtiLfR50VHubc5mAV8cGkMIdsPjJHTBSu4wn9e_ZvkaTKASy65te2Os%3D)**

Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.

But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race.

Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. **_[That's why I'm teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ce62518eee8423cbce4abfd81ce608b&_e=dzt1DxLY9YY5-ys7t2npvjkGViR24YBD00RSxTM2WDoGMamLasZGZWOqo5Q3ILq2EjwqXkfP1WC38GC1fH4adIuL8VJeKCp1HqvFCDNIPrneK6zL9goomkVrALnPDOZmjfWoX2mCAgT8iaP5ty2hbhP_GaVOKjD-Zj_YbZYpFN3n7mw8S7kh4f_AD3y_2IQmS5YEWl2-zkuK0LiA5k9Z5KO5tlg47Kguq7jw6CwBaNvdUfxO7ueNOGVeXzq6Do_S3QeLm8-2PD7aAe4Mq8sC2Y_YO97-IEv2SRhLf4my5_HFVYGQuOJf2P_9L5t08aU_OUKQGfgEYXVljdSBXEx98btSLIGZGCFgl12KWR6PZy5dK-TLAh8CPNCKg-qv5V0eKCm03aHa6x0B2eYzmH8cN9Fm0dzOX3wYUsEfMJNpTW8%3D "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.")_**

I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race.

**I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me?** ****[**YES >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ce62518eee8423cbce4abfd81ce608b&_e=dzt1DxLY9YY5-ys7t2npvjkGViR24YBD00RSxTM2WDoGMamLasZGZWOqo5Q3ILq2EjwqXkfP1WC38GC1fH4adIuL8VJeKCp1HqvFCDNIPrneK6zL9goomkVrALnPDOZmjfWoX2mCAgT8iaP5ty2hbhP_GaVOKjD-Zj_YbZYpFN3n7mw8S7kh4f_AD3y_2IQmS5YEWl2-zkuK0LiA5k9Z5KO5tlg47Kguq7jw6CwBaNvdUfxO7ueNOGVeXzq6Do_S3QeLm8-2PD7aAe4Mq8sC2UOmUtvvYQKUrFViI9C17YmUOwQR4x2Ad8JedEMVZeaHewwnZiRH2O_o_X1aRxdIM5ROM_6eKa5PnNL6chsvj5Us0PAQKQFH5yxEmbbXunbzb9MGTxT1Rfj37XKJQ_6blTPHqefFlvkJO8AJtbJv5XE%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ce62518eee8423cbce4abfd81ce608b&_e=dzt1DxLY9YY5-ys7t2npvjkGViR24YBD00RSxTM2WDoGMamLasZGZWOqo5Q3ILq2EjwqXkfP1WC38GC1fH4adIuL8VJeKCp1HqvFCDNIPrneK6zL9goomkVrALnPDOZmjfWoX2mCAgT8iaP5ty2hbhP_GaVOKjD-Zj_YbZYpFN3n7mw8S7kh4f_AD3y_2IQmS5YEWl2-zkuK0LiA5k9Z5KO5tlg47Kguq7jw6CwBaNvdUfxO7ueNOGVeXzq6Do_S3QeLm8-2PD7aAe4Mq8sC2X0KokvDTHBpikXkZTnjlW_pAHQ5KX_HpmRwvEY5hOg3MKEyc5pje4FRO1O9LYN6D-kqVeL4J5S1rA2iOBUirk3dz8HHgIrabai8vpOWVLQR8WlLgKes9qbIyLCw6TUvLMmKroA5ioBElFAc90YUJ4U%3D)****Thank you for hearing me out.

I look forward to fighting for the America First values that you, me, President Trump, Leader Scalise, and Matt Gaetz believe in.

God bless you,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
GOP Nominee for the FL-01 Special Election

body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, February 16th, 2025. | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAep3Nep6zvkoGIHWPWAJ9uhwTTQMEMxpC1KR0JIab5f8W8AarCMn38eqwp-cqzzD5TBARTkTMb7hlp_SFplm-61xzXkSlRKX93POk6LTIvuak3_6ECGs-ccAb_735GaGBB6eevEIAXBTqUxaZzuvqsdZ1v5dID4gT1b4188m-A4OWK06QKE1Z4rVxian8EDd_aesdLHr4YaARe-cjW4bxdS7bkk7Vl2sDQMLdchB3psiZak_jcoYoBS_YRAfGxB9lvb50GFBBzOuGONcd-6NctqjeKwJ1jGJs1_9bcNilJJrZ1mD3_w9OwmcRv5Llc2E0WTWSGGAb_YdmzLLjalvDIX_9XyPZrXKEmQuD_PkYDzsrBJUaqfS-UwlF1_Rm1GsmSErI7I0qxe57AjyAXCY8vw/4e2/IAGbQEb0RF2syJdm0eWG-w/h0/h001.AhQQ3dIK9V94PRHkMqj4-soFHE0jSn95UKXr27eG1jU)

1️⃣ **_Target Map:_ The DLCC launched our cycle target map, identifying key power building opportunities **
State Democrats are sounding the alarm as MAGA’s dangerous power grab at the federal level makes states the next battleground to stop Project 2025. [Winning a majority in our target states means having the power to fight back against the Trump administration. → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1RHA-_gftpK7KWi_Uh9RlotMAcLvUF3zSs5t5sxoeozxevY3pGjYMSXXrIo6sra8Svc558qLt8GSJ1l02oBBmSbK2dU89AtbJ0x5KQefREdNMiir7wSpUJVKeyCOC-GIHftoNS9JIY4EiTVEjLSzMCoMUq_kpxSQsreSPKeswmzaLPU--SuqWEK0SumwEPEzQO0bEh2N_4Nv9lIHjGC6RHkj43F1MjVE8bxkvsfL30vsVk-CJlj_jCmp_Bsmzj1F_8VVAi8A6oTidpQXdCLpMufEsSfDttaF__8q3TqLM3pJBWkp_F40PsmGsOPAeAG-hehl18JXDinqWbaMhYXPLE-1_JEJPi5qxFTQVv5Ddbtzu2Ta8mabnSR87cjzdPI0pGrqNtD_k3To5gE_HXGdxo7JNi082K_Ltkp0wWVL3BwKA8fanAw-w4JGYxsWfUORKYOfGGsNBQhm1tRwGhEahFdgl79jDMHn-cKJmhf0UYdS1b0eMM3BGlhZuCQwhizSjklLvs7qaJtKH12dlx2ccgC4D4Fz6vqFEw21GWOJbrVJND1H56NQcINwemm_vMEQNKFNDXuNAal0qSLEFc61xXCg6xDD2oVGHjSGOW5Ff3PZA/4e2/IAGbQEb0RF2syJdm0eWG-w/h1/h001.na6wqtBUVfYr_qioQ3d9238JaqeO7HGOdKLQEmm8hak)
2️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Democrats target Virginia as key battleground state for 2025 and 2026 **
All 100 Virginia House of Delegate seats will be up for grabs this November, and these races are being eyed as a national test for power ahead of the 2026 midterms. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, February 16th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Target Map: The DLCC launched our cycle target map, identifying key power building opportunities State Democrats are sounding the alarm as MAGA’s dangerous power grab at the federal level makes states the next battleground to stop Project 2025. 2️⃣ Virginia: Democrats target Virginia as key battleground state for 2025 and 2026 All 100 Virginia House of Delegate seats will be up for grabs this November, and these races are being eyed as a national test for power ahead of the 2026 midterms. 3️⃣ Trump Firewall: Republican-led states are seeking to implement measures to slash critical services from state governments In an attempt to mirror the Trump administration’s “DOGE” initiatives nationwide, Republican legislatures in red states are making dramatic cuts to government programs, and they are using Trump’s Project 2025 as their blueprint. 🔦 Spotlight: DLCC highlights top candidates The DLCC announced support for FOUR spotlight candidates who are facing critical races in the states. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen special elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Barack Obama: "Together, we need to build a bold, responsive Democratic Party that can tell a compelling story about who we’re fighting for and where we need to go as a country." And Democrats need to get to work ASAP!

And we spent down nearly ALL of our resources in the last election to gain seats in the House and keep it a near 50-50 tie.

name: United College Park
subject: Reminder: UCP Virtual Community Meeting Today at 4PM
body:
| |
---
Don’t forget! Our UCP Virtual Community Meeting starts at 4 PM today—join us from the comfort of your home for important discussions on property taxes, community advocacy, and local governance. | | [View in browser](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2NTAzMzEwMTUyNTY2MDY0LFwiclwiOjE0NjUwMzMyMjY2MzEyNjc3M30iLCJzIjoiMTRmMTY3NTliMDUyOTQzMCJ9)

|

**Hey UCP Family,** Just a quick reminder that our Virtual Community Meeting is happening today at 4:00 PM! We’ve mentioned it before, and now it’s time to grab your seat (virtually!) and join the conversation. We’ll be covering some important community topics, including: ✅ **Homestead Exemption & Property Tax Relief** – Ryan Bowersox will break down the new statewide amendment and what it means for College Park homeowners before Monday’s public hearing. ✅ **Fighting for Our Communities** – Reshard Snellings will share how he successfully pushed back against unwanted development, offering real strategies for holding local government accountable. ✅ **College Park City Charter Improvements** – A discussion on strengthening protections, pushing for better governance, and learning from other Atlanta communities. This is your chance to stay informed and engaged—all from the comfort of your home!

[https://zoom.us/j/4752828860?pwd=TlBCNzJROW4vWXFJQ3dUSzhwVnR...](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2NTAzMzEwMTU5OTA2MDk4LFwiclwiOjE0NjUwMzMyMjY2MzEyNjc3M30iLCJzIjoiNDZhNzAxYWMyZGM4Y2RkMSJ9)**

| | | | | PBS's free and educational programming has helped millions of kids across America learn reading, math, social skills, and so much more for DECADES – but it’ll all be taken away if Elon Musk has his say. Musk’s silly DOGE department wants to eliminate funding for public media even though these outlets provide critical programs for so many Americans. We can't let Trump and Musk gut our beloved PBS programming! We need Democrats to show a MASSIVE outpouring of support for PBS TODAY. [Will you sign our petition to save PBS?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8170064d-1449-441a-b689-d1efbd0fdb6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66eaa1ff-132a-4db8-8e17-da23b3b7c9c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Please add your name in support of PBS >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90aa6878-502d-460a-82bb-0168a66c93ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0217a02c-fe1f-441c-a628-8ad8c3d552f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

## USAID’s Troubling Ties to the Woketopus
The U.S. Agency for International Development wasn’t just spending your hard-earned tax dollars on transgender operas overseas—USAID also has troubling connections with the leftist pressure groups that infiltrated and advised the Biden administration. | Dear Hello This Monday is Presidents' Day.
From 1879 until 1970, it was called Washington's Birthday, a federal holiday honoring [Founding Father](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQVwkzGBNKER-BW0Fd_s2x6ejMcugMWeRG4d24HECjRPVLHR2ICEomgbpgyDQA7tfwyLsCpBcYL5b4X8-7M45yQ6h_nKjghrTR7-Pnv9M0FuUZEms134W_uN7cCnnBCq7vYHPHXQSzosQ1GoYtCMOBQwg==&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==) [George Washington](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQVrphOPxi9ZNod2wHg3CCvkg1VTPNZk1kpg02USOoW2Kja7m8Oe9yMSiqn4Sa3tqZ5l9O7SREnS6D0TrWeZe0Cs5FZDvXvjmoBNQEXgq4TXyCc-fTxXbk8DA==&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==), who led the [Continental Army](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQV0J2qlL57XnPsJ7iCMITYz4IpBincGRYy37nP2R5zVPgNiSrcKlnKvrb4azw28e7eVyQBJ6LZ3FLg5LDkK9Df9XVfKjfqS2zgLkmVgyVWvAeQolFS0IJAWg==&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==) to victory in the [American Revolutionary War](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQVqZmhrhFMJ-TWHSGVcYzXN_XeRIczHHOA3ZzhLNdDrwNycHxgmxjZlYLIE4OjxsU9OFoYu5tWAWdhPN0puKM-6O0yC6LGxEof2TtdH50PEwm_YaG3ZbbogQnNJNTMdmxxCZG0qbE41M8=&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==), presided at the [Constitutional Convention](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQVrKn5lYRoGJV-lVc0VAj_hfmsc5fI4fgo6YtMbvdNSo-6KeqQVmWZdBAdey16PBQHsoXgvHyyAliIotiuPy9ndNtpu8N4GZpBmo9XpLlu9c0Q01Z45Sgc9r80cEXnjqyngs8dO_nCII_xv-kn4ZiIgKDDD5FAZ12-&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==) of 1787, and served as the first [U.S. president](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQVKt09mo8GCne3HF7q7Mh3Wzg8rtWka9OEo2KUBLkVZdKQI3yn1as4lbnv28lkenordGpeNtE8kxZlARhH31iCSanfTlaGH8KsY6n2-euqJDFdo2N4YVn-GuPOiqyso_wdlF8JBRviAsY=&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==) from 1789 to 1797.
His actual birthday was February 22, 1732. To give federal employees a three-day weekend, in 1968, the Uniform Monday Holiday Act moved it to the third Monday in February.
Since 1971, Presidents' Day is now celebrated to honor all those who served as [presidents of the United States](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQVAEz6KpNnTV_D1fBKiEbtQCWxc32rwBfOZFLtt0N6d_Vnz8YNG1LlNNWhI8vhmEOIzhfTZbZuYRQzzVqTVZ_5hZ8n2HKLoV64g9YDvshjkpMe_Dg7TBA8s7XVWrTnu2BtJoBFhtz9pQY=&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==).
While many Americans celebrate Presidents' Day and enjoy a day off of work, we turn our focus to the last week of the 2025 General Assembly's Legislative Session, which will conclude this coming Saturday, February 22, 2025.
To review bills coming up on Monday in subcommittee, committee and the Senate floor, please click on the links above with the meeting details. There is a full listing of bills coming up, along with the titles, summaries and detail description of each bill.
As each of the House bills is voted on up or down by the Senate, you will see some bills being assigned to a conference committee to hash out the differences between the House and Senate companion bills. Usually conference committees involve a handful of Republican and Democrat legislators, with the majority Democrats. There's usually a token Republican assigned to the conference committees, but not always. Sometimes, only Democrats who control the Senate will be assigned to a conference committee. Ultimately, the governor signs the bill into law, vetoes the bill or sends back amendments.
As always, if you have any questions, please feel to reply to this email and I will do my best to answer your questions in a timely manner.
I've included a link to all bills that have passed both the House and the Senate for your review.

A couple of notes here with a plea to please contact Governor Youngkin to veto one particular bill coming to his desk.
The Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears and the Speaker of the House, Don Scott, both signed off on [HB1699](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8m3svvgNibNDTMs3MInEnqa4fzNiEDPNOrJnCFfxSqo4KGF9jAoDveiFkRAVyBW59Zo8utNVyPXxyQcmhmcCCGRkH-kkiKlvXVONPOT0XoJCPZG4-1LqMZz_OvaToaM18n2zDWCr1Ylt&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==), a bill that ends the tax exempt status of the Virginia Division of the United Daughters of the Confederacy and eliminates the tax-exempt designation for real and personal property owned by the Virginia Division of the United Daughters of the Confederacy, the General Organization of the United Daughters of the Confederacy, the Confederate Memorial Literary Society, the Stonewall Jackson Memorial, Incorporated, the Virginia Division, Sons of Confederate Veterans, and the J.E.B. Stuart Birthplace Preservation Trust, Inc.
For documentation, you can click [here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQVVwCEg6ovbT8vY3vwSjwHj76v_w7YKW8Ox4LYKf4fPldoyr253b-IzbVlUvgQUVBr8ynHw8oalqQKpFfIUYABDhaCD7uaPZQXoVWWsCkiBVMZNv58dI6Pur0exgKcHwUamCK5isu7x07cMz7FPlYd_Nl9MPdQiGIH745BN5hEpqBml7Aa31jbBjlL9Ur5uNRhohYt-vue13YAWVRfoASVq4rN9nV1Pew0I3vwbuomKr2pSauSx3Z0BDVKEnoF69H_W-8NipQ0x80TulWnASIe3N0Y_czK8QtJNxb-F2AZ4uG-h--C63juDZlw6O0zPXZKRPjupEOg7XWS6_0zrNIOKl_FzmGNlTGW_-_GmFWTnazW6vHgWoo5c-xhDJ8Yp_LVkDo7nZOZKRk=&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==). I hope the Governor vetoes this bill.
We either need to exempt all museums or none at all. Here's the [complete list of museums in Virginia whose property is exempt from taxation, as defined in the Code of Virginia under 58.1-3607.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eLXDmRl-2rjR43pgdaysStXX24AIuNd78WUaZwYx2acSZ17dcAx_8qspww_ElWQVRsieKWkq3yChFKOUP_qRaAOD7gvX-10msdLSo0h35pAj_8gZosuYsDtlIQzAovBcAEBm-i8W5-HnN7211CTSBUwXSnJZvjD0af8CASnwdd-3bfSBaZBi9kPHYskviGfHIhe3XCS3s-IwprXmuakmw--gvlrfLgc_&c=C_DkGxL9LsmsCeyPSuChvT56gM45BCOEokR46hWjasFggmCBHw-PRA==&ch=wgevqDujL7u7lEczfLZ7l75iMkMxqOkEqdZtpJZteJ5Pu75HQNHWBA==)
Personally, I'm sick and tired of the heritage of some being elevated, while the heritage of others is cancelled or mischaracterized.
We should either exempt all organizations from taxation, or none at all.
We should be consumed with protecting and supporting truth in history, not revising, or not telling the parts of history we don't like or understand.
Again, please contact Governor Youngkin's office and ask them to veto HB1699.

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | 2025 SESSION Monday and Tuesday Committee Schedule | == == == == == == == COMMITTEE ON LOCAL GOVERNMENTS Will not meet == == == == == == == == == | AMANDA CHASE | THE 2025 GENERAL ASSEMBLY ADJOURNS THIS SATURDAY, FEBRUARY 22 | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello This Monday is Presidents' Day. From 1879 until 1970, it was called Washington's Birthday, a federal holiday honoring == ==, who led the == to victory in the ==, presided at the == of 1787, and served as the first == from 1789 to 1797. His actual birthday was February 22, 1732. To give federal employees a three-day weekend, in 1968, the Uniform Monday Holiday Act moved it to the third Monday in February. Since 1971, Presidents' Day is now celebrated to honor all those who served as ==. While many Americans celebrate Presidents' Day and enjoy a day off of work, we turn our focus to the last week of the 2025 General Assembly's Legislative Session, which will conclude this coming Saturday, February 22, 2025. To review bills coming up on Monday in subcommittee, committee and the Senate floor, please click on the links above with the meeting details. There is a full listing of bills coming up, along with the titles, summaries and detail description of each bill. As each of the House bills is voted on up or down by the Senate, you will see some bills being assigned to a conference committee to hash out the differences between the House and Senate companion bills. Usually conference committees involve a handful of Republican and Democrat legislators, with the majority Democrats. There's usually a token Republican assigned to the conference committees, but not always. Sometimes, only Democrats who control the Senate will be assigned to a conference committee. Ultimately, the governor signs the bill into law, vetoes the bill or sends back amendments. As always, if you have any questions, please feel to reply to this email and I will do my best to answer your questions in a timely manner. I've included a link to all bills that have passed both the House and the Senate for your review. | | A couple of notes here with a plea to please contact Governor Youngkin to veto one particular bill coming to his desk. The Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears and the Speaker of the House, Don Scott, both signed off on ==, a bill that ends the tax exempt status of the Virginia Division of the United Daughters of the Confederacy and eliminates the tax-exempt designation for real and personal property owned by the Virginia Division of the United Daughters of the Confederacy, the General Organization of the United Daughters of the Confederacy, the Confederate Memorial Literary Society, the Stonewall Jackson Memorial, Incorporated, the Virginia Division, Sons of Confederate Veterans, and the J.E.B. Stuart Birthplace Preservation Trust, Inc. For documentation, you can click ==. I hope the Governor vetoes this bill. We either need to exempt all museums or none at all. Here's the == Personally, I'm sick and tired of the heritage of some being elevated, while the heritage of others is cancelled or mischaracterized. We should either exempt all organizations from taxation, or none at all. We should be consumed with protecting and supporting truth in history, not revising, or not telling the parts of history we don't like or understand. Again, please contact Governor Youngkin's office and ask them to veto HB1699. | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you. For starters, my email service costs about $300 per month. So please help out financially if you can. I do my own research and writing. So I promise there will be typos. Thanks in advance to all of my grammar hawks for your grace regarding this. I'm currently publishing this on a voluntary basis and to help you hold your government accountable. While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you. Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. I want to thank those of you in advance who have already contributed. I know who you are and know how much I appreciate your financial support. Thank you in advance. | | == | == == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

name: Andy Kim
subject: Trump is firing the people who root out corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Inspectors General tasked with rooting out Trump’s corruption have been fired.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102227341/528502456/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjI1NjFiYi03NmVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFcKFxvIX9CXwuS8osMdX0MI2HF-ldFuP_PzagEDk_Q=&emci=729dd158-f1ea-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d62561bb-76ec-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Donald Trump is firing the Inspectors General tasked with rooting out corruption in our government – and it's a flashing red warning sign. For example, the inspector general of the US Agency for International Development was fired this week, a day after his office released a report critical of the Trump administration's efforts to dismantle the agency. He's paving the way to remove every form of accountability right now, and we're not going to let it stand. While Trump claimed he wanted to "drain the swamp," he's making it easier for corruption and greed to run rampant – all to benefit himself and his billionaire buddies. **Americans deserve to have complete faith in the people who choose to serve in our government and the people they elect.** That means we need to know that politicians aren't profiting off their positions or blindly pursuing power at the expense of the people they serve. Firing the people who are in charge of rooting out corruption and are independent, nonpartisan civil servants is wrong. I know New Jerseyans are fed up with dishonesty, greed, and politicians only looking out for themselves and their families, and I'll do everything I can to get answers from the Trump administration and reinstate accountability and checks on the White House. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: Inspectors General tasked with rooting out Trump’s corruption have been fired. | | | | Donald Trump is firing the Inspectors General tasked with rooting out corruption in our government – and it's a flashing red warning sign. For example, the inspector general of the US Agency for International Development was fired this week, a day after his office released a report critical of the Trump administration's efforts to dismantle the agency. He's paving the way to remove every form of accountability right now, and we're not going to let it stand. While Trump claimed he wanted to "drain the swamp," he's making it easier for corruption and greed to run rampant – all to benefit himself and his billionaire buddies. Americans deserve to have complete faith in the people who choose to serve in our government and the people they elect. That means we need to know that politicians aren't profiting off their positions or blindly pursuing power at the expense of the people they serve. Firing the people who are in charge of rooting out corruption and are independent, nonpartisan civil servants is wrong. I know New Jerseyans are fed up with dishonesty, greed, and politicians only looking out for themselves and their families, and I'll do everything I can to get answers from the Trump administration and reinstate accountability and checks on the White House. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. name: Gay Valimont
subject: “Clerical Error” Running the FBI?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
**You won’t believe this—Trump officials were so eager to take over the FBI that they couldn’t even get their own power grab right.** Instead of following proper procedure, they accidentally put the wrong name on the White House website... and then just let the mistake stand. Now, the _only_ reason the current Acting FBI Director is in his position is because of an administration screw-up. This is Gay Valimont, FL-1 candidate, **and before special elections are in full swing I need your help putting an end to nonsense like this.**
---
---
**Let’s be clear: This isn’t just another embarrassing blunder.** It’s a symptom of a broken system—where Trump and his allies prioritize loyalty over competence, political stunts over public service, and chaos over accountability. We’ve seen where this leads. Corruption thrives when bad actors take over critical institutions. And here in Florida, we’re up against the same reckless approach—politicians who would rather play power games than actually serve the people. I’m running for Congress because we deserve leaders who take their responsibility seriously. I will fight to restore competence, ethics, and integrity to our government. But I can’t do it alone.
---

name: Jay Jones
subject: Trump can’t get away with this, folks
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]

Team,

I am running to be Virginia’s next Attorney General because we need leaders who will stand up to the illegal activities of the Trump administration.

Trump has consistently shown that he is willing to put the Constitution and our nation’s laws aside to fit his agenda.

He is trying to eliminate USAID and stop its lifesaving humanitarian efforts, even though he can’t supersede the Congressional mandate that created the agency. He has attempted to ban birthright citizenship, even though it’s a right enshrined in our Constitution’s 14th amendment. And he broke the law when he fired independent inspectors general who may have investigated his unethical conduct.

These are just a sliver of the unconstitutional and illegal decisions Trump has made – and we’re not even two months into his term.

But Jason Miyares, Virginia’s current Attorney General, is a far-right conservative who will refuse to push back against Trump’s many legal violations – even if they hurt the people he’s responsible for representing.

If I am elected to replace Jason Miyares, I won’t let Trump – or anyone else – violate our Constitution, our laws, or our democracy.

If you agree that it’s time Virginia replaces MAGA Miyares with an Attorney General who will protect the rule of law, will you please make a $5 contribution to my campaign today?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=5]

DONATE $5 TODAY → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=5]

Right now is a critical time for my campaign. I am working hard to get the support I will need from Virginians across the Commonwealth to get my name on the ballot to defeat Jason Miyares in November.

Your contribution will help me rally Virginians to be a part of my team so that I can win big when November comes around.

So will you please make a donation of $5 or more to support my signature collection work today? You will be the key to my victory.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=5]

DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=5]

Thank you,
Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Let’s regroup
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1518%2E791427%2ETbDgts)

Friend — It’s been a long week full of constant breaking news, so we thought it would be a good idea to quickly regroup.
Look, some folks say that “shock and awe” is Trump’s entire strategy.
Constantly fill the airwaves and social media with his illegal executive orders, his unqualified, controversial cabinet nominees, and his strange and offensive statements.
The goal is to leave the opposition (that’s us) reeling and unable to organize against the tidal wave of breaking news. It’s our job and the job of this progressive movement to stay focused on our goals and ready to take on the fights that matter most.
That’s why we’re reaching out today and asking for your support.
If you could chip in just $3 today, you would help Ilhan keep up the fight in Congress to oppose Trump and Elon Musk.
And it wouldn’t just be your $3, either. While you’re reading this email right now in your inbox, thousands of others are reading it too. Some have already chipped in their $3. Some are about to click one of the buttons below.
When everyone does their part, it adds up to be enough to take on the far-right and their corporate Super PACs and win big victories for our grassroots movement. We’ve seen it work time and time again.
**[So please, if you can, chip in $3 or whatever you can afford today. Help us cut through the noise and stand up to Trump’s administration in every way we can.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250216-1-120&t=2&akid=1518%2E791427%2ETbDgts)

To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Dave McCormick
subject: At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Please read this full message
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a0d4cd9235a4cc7a88144242476261a&_e=I6dZlook4A4MEkv1foYjlesn__lvTfxHN1Zb69ueqcxSScyCId_dF_gEGudOYX0hGju0uZlN1iRm80m2xeu4jDZpbjSmUgAN19RvaR2nrVNeOPXHCAEfA6waOlqaPZasJJhEPhFDNP7HZqtFyWi4SrMxk5XoTr3O9Bk9vFf9mjkhlxJ5Ug74s9_ZzdPrbtLWmUoGO1Gat89RMuAeWFlvU2MPCCcaeVCJ7m5t9tw12DgnVLhNTYpapeiqbTUyT1cUwwXPK9dGGT82SGDViNnPL8onr4Hven8bpSoRmhSLFkm1Mqi4pKAupPrOO-tN8Lz7WEm5fVj96ZLiAXMeGv9yLZ27v9-fOPEePN3IPfKjmeQ1q18LS4BC-K5D398oYe1CycIBVSBbqruX2gDfabTzZdWPQdp2AL_Fcuc2NmxzaUQ%3D)

Patriot ,

**At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do. **

_In just a few short weeks, the new administration and Congressional majorities have exposed an egregious amount of WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE of taxpayer dollars that has gone UNCHECKED**until now.**_

I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.

I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day.

**But the entrenched political class is terrified that we are uncovering their decades-long grift of lies and stealing from taxpayers.** **[They are doing everything they can to stop us and I WON'T TOLERATE IT.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a0d4cd9235a4cc7a88144242476261a&_e=I6dZlook4A4MEkv1foYjlesn__lvTfxHN1Zb69ueqcxSScyCId_dF_gEGudOYX0hGju0uZlN1iRm80m2xeu4jDZpbjSmUgAN19RvaR2nrVNeOPXHCAEfA6waOlqaPZasJJhEPhFDNP7HZqtFyWi4SrMxk5XoTr3O9Bk9vFf9mjkhlxJ5Ug74s9_ZzdPrbtLWmUoGO1Gat89RMuAeWFlvU2MPCCcaeVCJ7m5t9tw12DgnVLhNTYpapeiqbTUyT1cUwwXPK9dGGT82SGDViNnPLxsouTWFhh-ejn4bJQeIpI5k0Jk5uomx2DOQ5Cep32g4MUN_AlFpAMW4UulQgiM-OmHKd8_zoAdfQAwFHo0sFTFdtW2ZdTvtyV7bnGT5pLlZ8GIwouKizIrXGrLf9PlmTHqFQX7p5v_rw0ncJup4f2U%3D)**

**This is a long message and I hope you will read all the way to the end.**

I grew up in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania. We lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road.

I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a0d4cd9235a4cc7a88144242476261a&_e=I6dZlook4A4MEkv1foYjlesn__lvTfxHN1Zb69ueqcxSScyCId_dF_gEGudOYX0hGju0uZlN1iRm80m2xeu4jDZpbjSmUgAN19RvaR2nrVNeOPXHCAEfA6waOlqaPZasJJhEPhFDNP7HZqtFyWi4SrMxk5XoTr3O9Bk9vFf9mjkhlxJ5Ug74s9_ZzdPrbtLWmUoGO1Gat89RMuAeWFlvU2MPCCcaeVCJ7m5t9tw12DgnVLhNTYpapeiqbTUyT1cUwwXPK9dGGT82SGDViNnPL06N7cD4sK9FIvDNuOQVftwttyRmPqjWl3vRUAdS1tFNvjHLVhTQWQ7oXnJeg1B8HhixS62AGkpDHw1hQc2d6CwnJb7-bP5Yu3oDix7IsQKP3SXp-tesJx0Wq6ly_sJ2TxBPQrviv7jXmM4eP4nDssU%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a0d4cd9235a4cc7a88144242476261a&_e=I6dZlook4A4MEkv1foYjlesn__lvTfxHN1Zb69ueqcxSScyCId_dF_gEGudOYX0hGju0uZlN1iRm80m2xeu4jDZpbjSmUgAN19RvaR2nrVNeOPXHCAEfA6waOlqaPZasJJhEPhFDNP7HZqtFyWi4SrMxk5XoTr3O9Bk9vFf9mjkhlxJ5Ug74s9_ZzdPrbtLWmUoGO1Gat89RMuAeWFlvU2MPCCcaeVCJ7m5t9tw12DgnVLhNTYpapeiqbTUyT1cUwwXPK9dGGT82SGDViNnPL3Baop1gKcdcY5HY5RvFK_crz0owDSda-ngom23p29wr_L9i1iLz5jYMq7B_QOhef4tR_U-TP8EKW5NRTA1iDMCNFEubgvRzxAGzJJCwKQsk825oiQoCWCofccHH_FTuGILiveqYm9gc6hzEZ4ulrtc%3D)

My dad started his career teaching history, economics, & democracy at Punxsutawney High. My mom began teaching fourth through sixth graders at a public school near Pittsburgh.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a0d4cd9235a4cc7a88144242476261a&_e=I6dZlook4A4MEkv1foYjlesn__lvTfxHN1Zb69ueqcxSScyCId_dF_gEGudOYX0hGju0uZlN1iRm80m2xeu4jDZpbjSmUgAN19RvaR2nrVNeOPXHCAEfA6waOlqaPZasJJhEPhFDNP7HZqtFyWi4SrMxk5XoTr3O9Bk9vFf9mjkhlxJ5Ug74s9_ZzdPrbtLWmUoGO1Gat89RMuAeWFlvU2MPCCcaeVCJ7m5t9tw12DgnVLhNTYpapeiqbTUyT1cUwwXPK9dGGT82SGDViNnPL-6bVJogBM_8st70DrvUEhC3B2y1jca4o10yw-75ojgUtYJ_3typizXoHKmcq5e64ckFnxAfaiJhq-J1ZdYLIjcz2oU--JDGsr06LoKQ3Ns15klt1KCEktDP927JEDXkmJzMHR0pk5DKEKMo7r_KQko%3D)

I'm incredibly proud that my dad was chosen to be president of Bloomsburg State College (now Bloomsburg University) at only 34 years old.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a0d4cd9235a4cc7a88144242476261a&_e=I6dZlook4A4MEkv1foYjlesn__lvTfxHN1Zb69ueqcxSScyCId_dF_gEGudOYX0hGju0uZlN1iRm80m2xeu4jDZpbjSmUgAN19RvaR2nrVNeOPXHCAEfA6waOlqaPZasJJhEPhFDNP7HZqtFyWi4SrMxk5XoTr3O9Bk9vFf9mjkhlxJ5Ug74s9_ZzdPrbtLWmUoGO1Gat89RMuAeWFlvU2MPCCcaeVCJ7m5t9tw12DgnVLhNTYpapeiqbTUyT1cUwwXPK9dGGT82SGDViNnPL9mzjf2MntCoDu36DJTSH2O5w_0yHvDXOujBOXLIa33Q8vYea4TUbv1zOj3ljkqS2voUY9tTHXkhen4XuvHz1KizLyn6QVmaGeaMmVx49tD8qd_Kbsnha2rQv4Fql8ktxaoM6NQ4XhcdeaG6-sC03sc%3D)

I'm so proud of my parents' teaching careers and to have been raised in Bloomsburg.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a0d4cd9235a4cc7a88144242476261a&_e=I6dZlook4A4MEkv1foYjlesn__lvTfxHN1Zb69ueqcxSScyCId_dF_gEGudOYX0hGju0uZlN1iRm80m2xeu4jDZpbjSmUgAN19RvaR2nrVNeOPXHCAEfA6waOlqaPZasJJhEPhFDNP7HZqtFyWi4SrMxk5XoTr3O9Bk9vFf9mjkhlxJ5Ug74s9_ZzdPrbtLWmUoGO1Gat89RMuAeWFlvU2MPCCcaeVCJ7m5t9tw12DgnVLhNTYpapeiqbTUyT1cUwwXPK9dGGT82SGDViNnPLyMMkBoxgHNh_cLsFUU4OM2LlxFiMp04YJlcMtikastQETWCm46_LxJ2KlvfgQYPD7TDqgALaDiaJh0-c4nQxUoYqyVXLIVR2_51VPouGd1CTmrOcXmJ51wQ2KD0hl5rtN6Pv92OJIELM4Jy0mT0_sk%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7a0d4cd9235a4cc7a88144242476261a&_e=I6dZlook4A4MEkv1foYjlesn__lvTfxHN1Zb69ueqcxSScyCId_dF_gEGudOYX0hGju0uZlN1iRm80m2xeu4jDZpbjSmUgAN19RvaR2nrVNeOPXHCAEfA6waOlqaPZasJJhEPhFDNP7HZqtFyWi4SrMxk5XoTr3O9Bk9vFf9mjkhlxJ5Ug74s9_ZzdPrbtLWmUoGO1Gat89RMuAeWFlvU2MPCCcaeVCJ7m5t9tw12DgnVLhNTYpapeiqbTUyT1cUwwXPK9dGGT82SGDViNnPLwyBMZ5KiivUYxSJkgVNzKgOqRy-mcjgqtO4sXv35uBkyyL9i635X4DouKla2e86zlUgFBmPc3FzzyD7ZWvyQZk4iOeB90BLxAVRSFYkWgKtqPtSOBraqe8x5WXBksEAKS73BrEgAKLD2GoJo25Yuzc%3D)

It was there that I wrestled and played football and was nominated to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point.

clean_body: Please read this full message Patriot , At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do. In just a few short weeks, the new administration and Congressional majorities have exposed an egregious amount of WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE of taxpayer dollars that has gone UNCHECKEDuntil now. I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election. I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day. But the entrenched political class is terrified that we are uncovering their decades-long grift of lies and stealing from taxpayers. This is a long message and I hope you will read all the way to the end. I grew up in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania. We lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road. I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms. My dad started his career teaching history, economics, & democracy at Punxsutawney High. My mom began teaching fourth through sixth graders at a public school near Pittsburgh. I'm incredibly proud that my dad was chosen to be president of Bloomsburg State College (now Bloomsburg University) at only 34 years old. I'm so proud of my parents' teaching careers and to have been raised in Bloomsburg. It was there that I wrestled and played football and was nominated to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point. And it was there that I came home to a parade after serving in combat during the Gulf War. After the Army, I earned a Ph.D. in international relations before moving to Pittsburgh to start a career in business. I worked my way up to become the CEO of FreeMarkets, a successful tech startup that employed hundreds in Western Pennsylvania. I was then called to service again, this time in the highest levels of government as Under Secretary of Treasury and as Deputy National Security Advisor. Following this, I joined Bridgewater Associates, one of the largest, most successful investment firms in the world, which manages the pension plans of groups including teachers, firefighters and law enforcement. I have lived the American Dream. When I ran for the U.S. Senate to bring my decades of experience and love for our country to fix our broken economy that is a direct result of policies supported by the far left, I became a national target for outright LIES from mainstream media outlets like The New York Times and CNN. I have been asked why I ran for political office. I opened myself and my family up to attacks from the left, and every day felt like a battle. But I believe in America 's strength and resilience. And I believe our nation needs leaders who place service to others above all else. Thanks to the support of TENS OF THOUSANDS of grassroots patriots, I was able to fight back against the lies with the TRUTH about my life and business record. I'm no stranger to fighting for what is right and if we don 't continue pushing every single day to clean up the mess the career politicians made, we will lose America as we know it! Here's where I need your help, Patriot . We need to combat the Democrats ' lies and attacks with the TRUTH about how American tax dollars are being spent. I hate asking for money -- I'm not a career politician, and it's not in my nature -- but I have no choice but to ask if we're going to hit our fundraising goal this month. The Democrats know if they lose ground to the outsiders working to bring CHANGE, it will be IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to take back their majority in the next election. That's why I'm hoping you can spare Your donation will take us one step closer to bringing the CHANGE Americans voted for in November, and I am so grateful for your support. Thank you, Dave McCormick P.S. Democrats from all over the country are panicking and pulling out all the stops to attack Republicans who are shaking up Washington. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: The first question everyone asks when you run for office:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
I started The Long Run with one goal in mind: To help elect promising candidates from diverse, working class backgrounds
#
Friend — I hope you can give me just a minute of your time this Sunday morning.
I started The Long Run with one goal in mind: To help elect promising candidates from diverse, working class backgrounds. The kind of candidates who don’t usually get political and financial support when they decide to run for office and make a difference in their communities.
And listen, I’ve run my fair share of campaigns. I know how these things work. Once you announce that you want to run, the first question everyone asks is **“can you raise enough money to win?”**
It’s sad that money is so important in our political system, but it’s the game we have to play. And so many candidates who don’t fit the status quo — candidates who are Black, Brown, working class, LGBTQ+, disabled — struggle to get their campaigns off the ground simply because they don’t have the resources they need to be successful.
**_Or in other words, they don’t have a bunch of rich friends they can call up and ask for donations.**_
So, it’s February 2025. I know for many people the next election seems like this far-off thing in the future.
But if we want to see more working class leaders in Congress and more progressive fighters who will stand up to Donald Trump and Elon Musk, **we have to start investing right now, when it matters most.**
That’s why I’m asking you today: [**Will you make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford to The Long Run today? Help power our work as we start investing in the candidates who can take on the far-right and WIN in 2026.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb25.oEbnj0&refcode=em250216-1-240&t=1&akid=5486%2E196590%2EtG3DK8)

He is unvetted and out of control, hijacking our federal government. Elon and his team have installed private servers to rummage around Americans' private sensitive data. body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39441%2E3422442%2EpbhJPQ)
Derek, as a consumer protection attorney, Katie Porter has spent her career fighting for consumers.
Following the 2008 mortgage crisis, Katie was appointed to be California’s Independent Monitor over the Big Banks. The banks’ predatory lending practices had contributed to the mortgage crisis, and it was Katie’s job to hold the banks’ feet to the fire to make sure California families actually got the money they were owed thanks to an $18 billion settlement.
**Then in Congress, she passed laws to stop Big Pharma from price gouging** and used Congressional Hearings to secure things like free COVID testing for every American.
**As a consumer protection nerd, Katie’s deeply worried about Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s decision to gut the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau** —an agency which fights for consumers and goes after businesses that scam and cheat Americans. She’s been sounding the alarm about what this means for our whole economy.
**[Will you chip in $5 to help Truth to Power support folks who will carry on Katie’s fights for American consumers in Congress? We need more Democrats in Washington who will stand up to Trump.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250216?refcode=em20250216-39441&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39441_3422442_pbhJPQ&akid=39441%2E3422442%2EpbhJPQ)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250216?refcode=em20250216-39441&refcode2=39441_3422442_pbhJPQ&akid=39441%2E3422442%2EpbhJPQ)
More soon,
Team Truth to Power

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250216-39441&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39441_3422442_pbhJPQ&akid=39441%2E3422442%2EpbhJPQ)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39441%2E3422442%2EpbhJPQ).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
