name: Giffords.org
subject: Can we ask you for a quick favor?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We hope you’ll consider making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.
#

Hey, can we ask you for a quick favor? [**If you’re able to today, will you contribute ANY amount you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250216-1-b&t=1&akid=9995%2E3935704%2Ep8bYA8)
We understand that your inbox is probably filled with requests from other campaigns and organizations. We know it would be impossible to give to everyone every time they ask.
But, if today is the day you have $5, $10, or anything in between to spare, we hope you’ll consider making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
February is a short month, which means we have less time than we do in other months to reach our monthly fundraising goals. Right now, we’re pacing behind on these goals, so we’re relying on supporters like you to help us get back on track.
Right now, our gun safety movement is facing attacks from Donald Trump and the MAGA right. We need to do everything we can to sustain our resources and make sure we have what we need to fight back against the extremists who want to see our movement fail.
[**We know that even in these uncertain times, our gun safety movement is as strong as ever. So please, will you show your commitment to ending gun violence by making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250216-1-b&t=2&akid=9995%2E3935704%2Ep8bYA8)

The team at GIFFORDS

subject: Donald Trump and Elon Musk are now leading the charge to dismantle the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
The CFPB is your shield against financial predators — taking on huge corporations, exposing corruption, and fighting for your hard-earned money.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102235452/528522848/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmYxMjk5Ni04M2VjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9q9_UDfQ8GMnW_bD8Ua6e0r8EzYWkOgw2XnJuXdksM=&emci=e1586a86-05eb-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=72f12996-83ec-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=7731215)

| | Donald Trump and Elon Musk are now leading the charge to dismantle the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) in a power play to enrich themselves and their billionaire cronies. The CFPB is your shield against financial predators — taking on huge corporations, exposing corruption, and fighting for your hard-earned money. While Trump's inner circle schemes to rig the system, the CFPB is holding them accountable, shutting down scams, and making sure YOUR wallet isn't their next target. **Since its launch, the CFPB has delivered $20 billion in relief for consumers, including reducing loan balances and erasing debt. Now, its future is in peril.** This is another shameless raid on our wallets, and it's one of the many ways they're bringing Project 2025 to life. Trump and Musk are grabbing power to dismantle any institution and punish any person who stands in the way of their plan to make the richest even richer. **_The New York Times_****reports Musk has been targeting many of the federal agencies and officials who have been engaged in investigations of Musk's own multiple companies.** **_It's blatant corruption and an abuse of power._** Trump is going to try to install a loyalist crony to head the CFPB, and I'll fight him each step of the way. We must ensure the CFPB can continue to fight for everyday Americans, not greedy corporations and billionaires. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Folks, I’ve enjoyed talking to so many of you while canvassing throughout Delaware last year. Through our conversations, it’s clear that Delwareans are ready to make even more progress than ever before. But I might not be able to meet everyone who reads this email – that’s why I want to know what issues are top priority to you now that my first session as a Senator is in full swing. I ask my team to send these surveys because it ensures that I’m addressing the issues that matter most to you and your family.
This survey shouldn’t take long – plus, it will help us determine what our campaign strategy will be for the weeks and months ahead.
[**So before you exit out of this email, I want to make sure that your voice is heard. | | **_Meet Kat_** Kat Cammack is currently serving her third term representing the FREE state of Florida in the People’s House as FL-03 Congresswoman. And her road from the small cattle ranch she grew up on to the halls of Congress in our nation’s capital has been far from ordinary. A third generation commercial sandblaster, Kat originally aspired to take over her family’s business and continue the rural, rodeo lifestyle she had grown so accustomed to. That was until a failed Obama-era housing policy caused Kat’s family to lose their ranch, leaving her and her mother homeless. They lived in their car and bounced from cheap motel to cheap motel just to keep a roof over their heads. But overcoming these hardships moulded Kat into the gritty and unapologetic leader she is today. After her family’s livelihood was destroyed by big government, she made it her life mission to deliver federal reform in the DC Swamp for the American people. So she packed her belongings and moved to Florida’s 3rd Congressional District – where she would serve as a Deputy Chief of Staff for nearly a decade before running for Congress herself. After emerging victorious in a brutal, 10-way GOP primary contest, the people of FL-03 elected Kat to serve them in the People’s House in November of 2020. Throughout her journey from homelessness to the House of Representatives, Kat Cammack has shown unwavering and unapologetic grit in her fight for the American people. And she has no plans of backing down until we truly have a government for the people, by the people once again here in the United States. When she’s not going toe-to-toe with the Washington Swamp, Kat enjoys spending time with her loving husband Matt – who serves as a firefighter and SWAT Medic with the Gainesville Fire Rescue. In the little spare time that they have, you can find Kat and Matt fishing, skeet shooting, or watching Gators football. They are incredibly proud to call north central Florida’s “Gator Nation” home. Go Gators, and let’s keep Florida the most FREE state in the union!

body:
Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire, has worked tirelessly to transform our government in just a matter of weeks — and the elected leaders all around him just seem to be letting it happen.
#
Peter,
Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire, has worked tirelessly to transform our government from a democracy to an autocracy just a matter of weeks — and the elected leaders all around him just seem to be letting it happen.
It’s un-American. It’s unpatriotic. And we can’t afford to let any of them go unchecked.
**Electing strong leaders up and down the ballot, to safeguard the values enshrined in our constitution, is one of the only ways we can fight back and hold him accountable.**
**[Will you please support Heartland Patriots today by rushing a donation of $10 or whatever you can? name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Veterans are getting fired. VA staff are getting fired. We need details.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
If we don’t hear from you we can’t tell your story.
#
Peter:
Musk and Trump fired 1000 VA staff, including staff working the Veterans Crisis Line. That’s confirmed.
Musk and Trump are firing Veterans across federal agencies. That’s confirmed.
We’re hearing a trickle of stories every day, and most of us here at VoteVets know someone affected by these purges in one way or another. **We need to hear more.** If you have been directly or indirectly impacted by these purges, please:
**[This link will send you to the VoteVets Tip Sheet. If you have been fired by the Trump administration, if you know someone who has been fired, or if you or someone you know has been impacted by program cuts, add your story right away.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250216_vv_pac_em_tipsheet/?source=em250216-1-f&akid=34179%2E3013755%2EmQKtw-)**
| [ADD YOUR STORY](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250216_vv_pac_em_tipsheet/?source=em250216-1-f&akid=34179%2E3013755%2EmQKtw-)
---
This is extremely important. Here’s why:
Trump controls the White House, and Elon Musk controls Trump. Republicans control the House and the Senate, and they’ve ceded all their oversight authority to Musk and Trump. The Supreme Court is dominated by arch conservatives.
At the federal level, our ability to prevent Donald Trump and Elon Musk from imposing their radical, extremist agenda is extremely limited.
But we can still impose a cost. We can make every day a living hell for them. We can make so much noise that everyone in the country knows that Musk and Trump are coming for your VA benefits. They’re coming for Social Security. They’re coming for Medicaid, Medicare.
We have to make everything they do politically untenable. That’s our hammer, and we need to hit some nails. VoteVets produces some of the hardest hitting advertisements in politics, and we can deliver this message better than anyone.
**If we don’t hear from you we can’t tell your story.** So, please:
**[If you or someone you know has been impacted in any way by Trump’s purges, use this link and add your story to the VoteVets Tip Sheet.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250216_vv_pac_em_tipsheet/?source=em250216-1-f&akid=34179%2E3013755%2EmQKtw-)**
| [ADD YOUR STORY](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250216_vv_pac_em_tipsheet/?source=em250216-1-f&akid=34179%2E3013755%2EmQKtw-)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: Save PBS via Our Revolution
subject: ANOTHER attack on PBS and NPR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

🚨🚨Breaking news 🚨🚨: Trump and Musk’s vow to slash funding for our public
media just got even more real. Republicans in both the House and the
Senate are pushing forward bills to STOP all funding for NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?t=1011&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ][IMG]

With a $30 million budget shortfall that’s already forced NPR to lay off
staff and shut down podcasts, public media stations are not in a position
to launch a massive campaign to save themselves.

But we are. Republicans have come for public media before, and public
outcry has forced them to stand down. Now we need to do it again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?source=email-02162025&t=1012&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Our Revolution is already hard at work mobilizing record numbers and
unleashing a huge lobbying push on Congress. But to win this fight, we’re
going to need EVERYONE – will you add your name to send a message straight
to Congress to save NPR and PBS?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?source=email-02162025&t=1013&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]ADD YOUR NAME

It’s not surprising Republican members of Congress are piling on efforts
to wipe out public media. “NO MORE FUNDING FOR NPR, A TOTAL SCAM!” Trump
wrote on Truth Social last year. Musk is labeling public media as
“propaganda” and has clear plans to cut hundreds of millions in funding
for the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, which funds NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?t=1014&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ][IMG]Then the FCC launched formal ‘investigations’ into NPR and PBS...and
now Republicans in Congress are preparing a bill to COMPLETELY HALT
funding for the public media stations.

It’s completely outrageous, but to actually pass the bill, Republicans
will need almost unanimous support in Congress. This playbook had failed
before — so this is a fight we can win.

We’re going all out to raise the temperature and make sure they ALL hear
from thousands of constituents who believe in a public media so they know
that a ‘yes’ vote is a risk they don’t want to take ahead of the
midterms.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?source=email-02162025&t=1015&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Will you urgently add your name?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-02162025._VmilA&t=1007&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-02162025.-m_yFB&t=1008&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-02162025.TeKLGp&t=1009&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-02162025.mo8Zx2&t=1010&akid=7715%2E5885482%2ELpW9hP ]GIVE ONCE

Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f638b6c553e442dd9acf16aa566357ee&_e=M319IuV8Fo_D0lSAKPWroafYfXy3SXUtBQuqEELhaoWZQDjITUBH8zfouXUBsMADjO3l_CfbsVo7WduPw5hKkEdngzfsOeulYVCkOZzcixaqU2YwBzKT3rEoZ2nLywyedi4Bm3saZIw0B6hvKWLS3-dRbVjss8q2y8na-1B1mVvqlH45BptIPvpTU3lNsGzCn4trkB1YlGQpJ0FglPiu2rf7ybeIhjNHuXCwTufwZVwEt7iYPHZi1qn_XxoW7O8TfcKxOFLNKe2w95rttX8kJYnQFAOli3sxVE3Bstjgu70nDGvzriIncdNMV523IdRP54aNxJV-WK1YR-oIZZPYpqVSUa91Upu31ZWexh8E3Ln0WdhlrPaGzxxuPnqTrrnq)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

Conservative talk show host Larry Elder **[EXPLODED AT disrespectful California liberal](https://substack.com/redirect/e1ad44de-1df0-4f22-a518-6deed6101245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who called in to his show just to hurl personal attacks, including his unsuccessful run for Governor in 2021.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e1ad44de-1df0-4f22-a518-6deed6101245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e1ad44de-1df0-4f22-a518-6deed6101245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The caller immediately hit Elder with a personal low blow, "I wonder why you are always beating down Democrats that run this city, you ran for Governor, you didn't make it, you didn't come close!" he said. "No one agreed with your ideas, that's why you lost!"

**[Elder, understandably now angry, fired back,](https://substack.com/redirect/e1ad44de-1df0-4f22-a518-6deed6101245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "What did I say I would do about our public education Rod? You said I had no answers, so tell me what I said I would do!"

Rod from California very quickly proved he had no idea what stances Elder took on issues including homelessness, public education, and cleaning up the brush in California.
"What did I say... You call me up, you say I have no answers and you don't even know what I said?! That's pretty PATHETIC!!"

After a heated back and forth, **[Elder demanded the caller to admit he didn't have a clue what he was talking about.](https://substack.com/redirect/e1ad44de-1df0-4f22-a518-6deed6101245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "You need to apologize... you moron!"

Watch the heated screaming match here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e1ad44de-1df0-4f22-a518-6deed6101245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._
In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying.
**OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED**
They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks...
And who suffers? YOU and your family.
Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness.
Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled.
**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**
Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**.
Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the **[Patriot Power Generator](https://substack.com/redirect/e7c1a777-7be7-403a-ae09-f01e0cfd3a27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.**
And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse.
**FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.
_**And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_
Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars.
Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures...
Those who acted fast and got their **[4Patriots solar generator](https://substack.com/redirect/e7c1a777-7be7-403a-ae09-f01e0cfd3a27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers.

# Canada fans BOO U.S. National Anthem followed by chaotic fights during Saturday hockey showdown
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c7067a8-a0de-425d-b9d5-bd8650841906?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The USA-Canada hockey showdown at the 4 Nations Face-Off turned chaotic Saturday night **[as Canadian fans booed the American national anthem](https://substack.com/redirect/b2af6d27-28a3-493e-8941-217a976583f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , leading to multiple fights on the ice.
The booing began as "The Star-Spangled Banner" played, echoing through Montreal's Bell Centre despite pleas for respect from the public address announcer.
"We knew it was going to happen," U.S. defenseman Zach Werenski said. "It happened the last game, it's been happening in the NHL before this, and we knew tonight was going to be the same way. We obviously don't like it."
The tension boiled over immediately after the opening faceoff, with three separate fights erupting within the first nine seconds of the game. Matthew Tkachuk of the U.S. and Brandon Hagel of Canada were among the first to clash, followed by Tkachuk's brother, Brady, engaging with Sam Bennett.
The animosity continued throughout the match, fueled by recent political frictions between the U.S. and Canada, particularly after President Donald Trump's remarks about tariffs and annexation. Despite the early skirmishes, the U.S. managed to secure a 3-1 victory, with Jake Guentzel scoring twice, including the game-sealing empty-netter.

We obviously don't like it." The tension boiled over immediately after the opening faceoff, with three separate fights erupting within the first nine seconds of the game. Matthew Tkachuk of the U.S. and Brandon Hagel of Canada were among the first to clash, followed by Tkachuk's brother, Brady, engaging with Sam Bennett. The animosity continued throughout the match, fueled by recent political frictions between the U.S. and Canada, particularly after President Donald Trump's remarks about tariffs and annexation. Despite the early skirmishes, the U.S. managed to secure a 3-1 victory, with Jake Guentzel scoring twice, including the game-sealing empty-netter. | | POLL Who is the best First Lady? | ? ? ? ? ? * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Gabe Amo
subject: Republicans’ Road Map to Hurt Families
disclaimer_text: paid for by deep cuts to programs that help families
body:
Hi Friend, Last week was a big one for our work to fight back against Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans’ efforts to hike costs for Americans.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102239315/528533345/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAzOGVhNDItOGJlYy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-3pFnPRsKi5gWjnmZi06za3LjDRjmLsXA3y1nzjlSyQ=&emci=fed90af6-89ec-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8038ea42-8bec-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=12466492)
---
| | Hi Friend,
---
Last week was a big one for our work to fight back against Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans’ efforts to hike costs for Americans.
---
They passed a budget blueprint to put us on a path of less opportunity, higher poverty, and more inequality.
---
**Simply put, their budget is a roadmap for hurting families.**
---
The Republican plan will raise health costs, like monthly premiums, kick school kids and families off food assistance, and take away homeowners’ ability to increase home values with clean energy improvements.

---
**I will always stand up for all of our families**.
---

clean_body: Hi Friend, Last week was a big one for our work to fight back against Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans’ efforts to hike costs for Americans.| | | | | Hi Friend, Last week was a big one for our work to fight back against Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans’ efforts to hike costs for Americans. They passed a budget blueprint to put us on a path of less opportunity, higher poverty, and more inequality. Simply put, their budget is a roadmap for hurting families. The Republican plan will raise health costs, like monthly premiums, kick school kids and families off food assistance, and take away homeowners’ ability to increase home values with clean energy improvements. As a new leader on the House Budget Committee, I pushed back vigorously against these deeply harmful cuts that jeopardize people’s health and well-being. I will always stand up for all of our families. = = We can’t just let Republicans win in their push for costly tax cuts for the 1% that grow our nation’s debt and are paid for by deep cuts to programs that help families. I’m grateful for all your help. Let’s stick together, Gabe | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. name: Rob
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250216&t=1&akid=1645%2E1088799%2ESg0ltQ)
Hey, it’s been a busy few weeks, to say the least!
I can’t believe it, but February’s almost over, which means **we’re less than two weeks away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline.**
As I continue to move our lawsuits against the Trump administration along, stay prepared to file new ones when necessary, and keep up my other work to help improve the lives of Californians, it leaves very little room for fundraising.
**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to fuel our campaign? I truly appreciate it.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250216?refcode=em20250216-1645&amount=5&refcode2=1645_1088799_Sg0ltQ&akid=1645%2E1088799%2ESg0ltQ)**

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xdfVa9TJynp2wd5_xH8k4LPT1TEZaglLYZ9et9mjDPQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157232804)
I'm often asked about who I read, learn from, and can recommend to others? Here, I am happy to recommend you subscribe to and follow each of these four thoughtful voices. If you have the capacity to become a paid subscriber to each of them, please do. But at a minimum, I hope you sign up as a free subscriber. Each of these individuals have led by example for years. Their insights cover the core issues of justice that matter to each of us--economic justice, racial justice, gender justice, and climate justice. And given the relentless assaults from the current regime on each of these rights, the advocacy these leaders offer is more critical now than ever before.
**Let 's Address This.**
**Before you dive into this piece. Join 116,000 like-minded activists and subscribe below to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xdfVa9TJynp2wd5_xH8k4LPT1TEZaglLYZ9et9mjDPQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=157232804)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3a580550-d230-4aca-b2c4-446274dd7889?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Top Row: Dara Starr Tucker (left side), Sylvia Salazar (right side) Bottom Row: Lindsay Meyer-Harley (left side), Salaam Bhatti (right side)
## Dara Starr Tucker
Dara is the quintessential renaissance woman. She is a scholar, a singer, a songwriter, a musician, a radio host, and an activist.
Her brilliant series, "_The Breakdown with Dara Starr Tucker_ ," examines issues at the intersection of race, culture, and politics and frames those issues in their proper historical context. This allows readers to not only understand the news, but to better understand the culture in which those news events happen, and their place in it. She's also one of the most prominent Black voices you'll find on social media, with more than 1 million followers on TikTok, and hundreds of thousands more across numerous platforms. Dara's voice is sorely needed in 2025 America, and I encourage you to support her work and her advocacy.
[Subscribe to Dara on Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/7df1f2ee-5462-45ab-97ab-18920827b1ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Sylvia Salazar
Sylvia is a tech expert turned activist and excels in both fields. As a mom and Colombian American, she brings a critically under-represented voice to American politics and social justice.
Through her series "_Latino Lens_ ," Sylvia brilliantly helps her readers and followers understand the issues impacting our nation through a Latino perspective. She then helps her readers discover how to mobilize our community, and effectuate meaningful change. As we saw a significant shift towards the right from the Latino community in the 2024 election, Sylvia's voice is more important than ever before to debunk disinformation and ensure Latino voices are not just heard, but understood and taken seriously. I encourage you to follow Sylvia and get a Latina's take on what's happening now--which she describes as "insightful, impactful, and a little spicy."
[Subscribe to Sylvia on Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/64887b87-bc9d-4e73-99b9-7f51746f9c45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Lindsay Meyer-Harley
Lindsay Meyer-Harley founded _Still We Rise_ , as a community for good. It has since grown to more than 400,000 followers of people dedicated to human rights and social justice.
With _Still We Rise_ , Lindsay dives into the happenings of politics, locally, nationally, and worldwide. She is a champion for protecting reproductive rights, women's rights, healthcare justice, climate justice, and for a plethora of non-profit organizations serving the most marginalized in our nation and world. _Still We Rise_ excels at educating on action steps and ways we can collectively rise up for all people in their times of need. Lindsay does this every single day with compassion, education, hope--and as she'll proudly admit herself--a little snark.
[Subscribe to Lindsay on Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/7760c2e1-6ac7-421a-bea6-8d76a6da43e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Salaam Bhatti
Salaam Bhatti is a poverty lawyer, an author, a stand up comedian, and someone who has dedicated his life to ensuring no person in this country every goes hungry.
Through his series, "_A Paycheck Away with Salaam Bhatti_ ," Salaam takes readers on a journey towards ending poverty by learning about the root cause issues, exploring solutions, and sharing ways each of us can act. His scholarship is rarely made available in mainstream media, and the bite-size samples we see on social media are too often misinformation. As wealth and income inequality hits record highs, and as the current regime plans to cut hundreds of billions from social welfare programs--including food access--it is more critical than ever that we know our rights and how to protect them. After living in poverty himself for nearly a decade and working as a public benefits attorney, Salaam is committed to growing a community that seeks to build a nation where we are no longer a paycheck away from eviction, hunger, and death.
[Subscribe to Salaam on Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/b8a630ab-e4fb-41a2-a607-39c4d96de763?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Conclusion
In a time of unprecedented assaults on justice, equity, and truth, the voices of Dara , Sylvia , Lindsay, and Salaam are not just valuable--they're vital. Each of these brilliant advocates bring unique and key insights to the most urgent battles of our time: racial justice, immigrant rights, gender equity, economic justice, and climate action.
But they cannot do this work alone. By subscribing, sharing, and supporting their work--whether as a free or paid subscriber--you become part of a movement that rejects apathy and embraces action. So, I urge you: Don't just be a bystander--invest in a future committed to justice. We are in a moment where history is being written--not by the powerful, but by those who refuse to remain silent. Stand with these leaders. Stand with me. And together, let's ensure justice not only has a voice but a chorus loud enough to change the world.
**Before you go! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I have exciting news, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I’m launching my campaign for Governor of the great state of New Mexico.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc05a120d-ed08-4953-ba2a-5a504f1f016c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Blue Amp Action said I could reach out with some exciting news, Peter: I’m launching my campaign for Governor of the great state of New Mexico — my home — to bring our state together and build a bright future for all who live here. I’m humbly asking: [Will you join us as a day-one donor by donating just $3 or more to my campaign and Blue Amp Action now? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5b36035-870a-4cad-960c-2616ff784f44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The amount you give doesn’t matter. What matters is building a campaign with the support of real people. That’s who I am and who I came from. That’s who I am running to serve. My roots in New Mexico run 35 generations deep. The Pueblo people were the first farmers in the high deserts of New Mexico, an agricultural tradition that still continues today. I am here because of my grandfather, who worked for decades as a diesel mechanic on the railroad. Somehow he also kept a field — picking worms off the corn as it grew, like the generations before him. I am here because of my grandmother, a survivor and a caretaker who woke up every day before the sun. She was the one who gave me my true love of cooking New Mexican cuisine. (She wouldn’t let us in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours.) I am here because of my parents and their sacrifice. My mother, a Pueblo woman, served in the Navy. My father, a Marine, received a Silver Star for his service in Vietnam. He now lies in honor at Arlington. I am here because of my beloved child, who I raised on my own. I started a small business to pay the bills, but it still wasn’t always enough. We relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries to feed our family. I will never forget how that felt or the kindness of those who helped us – strangers who became community. When I look at my Somah, I see perseverance, strength and hope. These are my stories. These are stories of New Mexico. These days, our differences are blown so far out of proportion. We lose sight of a simple fact: we all live in the same state, together. All of us in New Mexico come from love, survival, and sacrifice. We all want to live good lives — and we want even more for our children. The current president and his billionaire friends look at the lands and the people of this country and think: what can I exploit? I am running to ask: if we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation? We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure everyone shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico’s children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities. I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we’re leaving a better future for our children. [Will you join us with a day-one donation, split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18af2794-81df-4729-bfe9-a4eaca19235d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I would be honored to have your support. Many thanks to Blue Amp Action for helping spread the word. I hope you’ll join us, Peter! Be fierce, Deb
---
|

| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|

| | | | |

---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b2b64af-05b8-4677-b55b-701fa410d624/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: This is what REAL leadership looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We won’t stop until the border is secure

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
|
---
Did you see the news, Peter? The Trump administration announced that 969 illegal immigrants were arrested in just ONE DAY. We’ve been asking for this for the last 4 years, and it's good to see law and order is back on the menu.

I also made border security a pillar of my campaign and will support this administration's moves at every step. But we still need to finish the job and secure our border once and for all.

With all the recent pushback from Democrats, we’re going to need the support of the American people to secure our border finally. **[**Will you spare a minute to sign your name and chip in to support finishing the border wall?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-esHv8C1cQ)**
---
[ FINISH THE WALL](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-gtmjVxOWXL9sm-U7mIc-g)
---
[ SIGN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Thank you for taking border security seriously and signing your name.
---

Congressman Troy Downing

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Activists across the country are protesting on Presidents Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Together, we will keep demanding a government for the people, not for billionaires. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWlFu7qGChgJG9USngnO0giA014FOBsJwSaSl1XfTzUGz2jgbYLKRzaSyztCcjFrvgwJCcCAloyps4aMRyVcOFzD6Dp9CgQgi75RD4po5wwlenqwwYPecxqTkZuv1_DnY5wQVG441VRiJiIenCi40k-uTUZCGIVzRwQ3N6ciACxwQDJKkb-jywENIctx_aC2fEVdgK-RQVf6UoSwL0lfOSZLQsfPnc-irN59I8FMChj9A/4e2/FoXAaJE3SBuLtTFT-PGlMg/h0/h001.J4xW0p4IEqrBpIVF6ihYUJ2yAODXEL5AvkkS6-AHxQY)
---
Friend, This Presidents Day, we’re resisting this President. Activists are planning anti-Trump actions all over the country for Presidents Day, and organizations have already been blocking this lawless administration’s actions in the courts. Together we will boycott, march, litigate, mobilize, speak up, and come together in solidarity. We will out-work the hate and out-organize the billionaire class. In Congress, I will keep doing everything in my power to push back against this administration’s attacks. In the past few weeks, I’ve joined local organizations to share information about immigrants’ rights, to fight for affordable health care, and to protect public education. I joined federal employees outside the Office of Personnel Management to protest the administration’s reckless efforts to dismantle our federal workforce. In the House Oversight Committee, I voted to subpoena Elon Musk to testify before Congress and explain why a billionaire who nobody voted for is apparently in charge of our government. Republicans blocked that effort, but I will keep pushing to hold Musk accountable. We won’t let the richest man on earth, who gets $20 billion in government contracts, steal money from the most vulnerable among us. [**Can you chip in today so we can keep fighting back against this president and his unelected billionaire friends?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtqTWUTlzrBoWw1uLeD1ZPKvpvWFyVv55UQVkFwxnDfqOFpAVMGmHL7p1icrIRIXsFvIKUNERCC6bRgLYXQQoO_8NJ3RGLb_oLw9pmgCtbSxj97kpBpC7RwiTBVNLkm1jheMgelluATLsrN-uFJ6we0JNje9__rayHh8G4STkQY_Q5otJJ1jApQHnrvXODQ3XdjSZcVNvurbpn-l004pOY28YWjj-AoGTB3qckood7RBhsZkSNA3iDrCQHD-I0P5FJK2B8aIsddxWPqaJnju3tq4zDecxEKoOnsH8tI31EYtGiiNkT-kywDISrz5vSwOKd8cBST_-OkF3SDsaLdnlMOuNKAa9H_lyRRd3wT08zYCG3DcYh5fhwbx63YEyS9iyihcXet2D-8pt15sdbvt-BW/4e2/FoXAaJE3SBuLtTFT-PGlMg/h1/h001.nO6rS_osmL8MJjD2Ifufo7jAK6zRQTzyWFh_Aw7cVlE) As a Congresswoman, I took an oath to uphold the Constitution, which gives Congress control over federal spending and oversight authority over the president. The Constitution lays out a balance of government, which is why the White House cannot dismantle federal agencies without the approval of Congress. By illegally seizing power over our federal agencies, this president and his unelected billionaire friends are creating a constitutional crisis. I’m pushing back against attacks on agencies like the Department of Education and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, which protects working people from getting ripped off. In March, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau was set to eliminate $49 billion in medical debt from 15 million Americans’ credit reports. My team and I worked hard to help win this victory, and it’s one we must defend. In this new Congress, I was also appointed to serve on the House Financial Services Committee again, where I will keep demanding a government that puts people over profits. I’m also fighting back against this presidential administration’s attempt to roll back protections for workers and marginalized communities. Amid the GOP assault on our civil rights, I just re-introduced the _Justice For All Act_ to give people of every background and identity the tools they need to fight discrimination in our communities. I will keep standing up for Black, brown, disabled, and LGBTQ+ Americans, and anyone else targeted by this administration. [**Will you help me fight fascism by chipping in $5 or more today? This Presidents Day and beyond, we will keep resisting this president.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtqTWUTlzrBoWw1uLeD1ZPKvpvWFyVv55UQVkFwxnDfqI7SnTc2eb0X1StjjrJR2bb8lUQn85FYOrhT-UOkulHd_GlnQSHRhczp2L3-y4jFb7q7yJKoUuBXyudgQNU9XneLOP0oIVKmGGX_LR7vQLVTOwdnPcrFZDmUVrJkR92tSiajdx0kq7tyeYEDjYoN-jaQTnOSvsAaf2SCrle4DjgtwnDPs67t4uc9Hfyhaw4HU9LUsDEG59vFAtLOeKlB9aNZgG7jmYbcZCNAkYTwOC-ZqhRb0EWCR5rwGpq8U4wz8TQcsSX-uyInFyW2zKd4LrTp-gQU80uMOOIqJQdyIjAsWtg7o247BIoB0T95RJ8vOHZfq5N2YjHHD8jOnn9JZnBMUQNQZbFyiQAdiHwizFv6/4e2/FoXAaJE3SBuLtTFT-PGlMg/h2/h001.7r4iueOH3YQI6cmzuHtrCvf0Wb-UPB1M_ngcJ5d3fa0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtqTWUTlzrBoWw1uLeD1ZPKd4pIaupMGJJYTgpzjE5K9HDHy_3b_Furz9SrqIpKL2Lj-Cx0DwfBybbDJO4jWVbCD-L4f0hxjUsXcC8XHoHE6rqhaPdNHFG6fQDlOD2HuiY89Sl9aWrnv7kAHvxdkv6lvebsnIB_52I2gphlAnLzlCLAcbYTTgq7k1036EHxoFDn_reXE63EsvFJxrlRBKzwZL981GyAtsVIS0ddHb_HOCaGT6eqg-P0s4iFuHD2U7ycstYWdbMlttFvtK0McjkoQroKfkVBaR9VwSOa-VbkSINwrM19EWGcNCyG2BvP9om_Gr4dMKtJvaeqrEY8xWref624cTT1WDInW4DWvOmd-Hoj9ju74qWF_-x8ziULihQoz6C6Ipf36YKCCgIwhI3VOCeKmDVaCryjLhYG1-D9roeS2QIuGYoOQOUKerbBNYg/4e2/FoXAaJE3SBuLtTFT-PGlMg/h3/h001.VUkl7qCsTwdsHmgTrvKVg_M85IOhL-576juvyt4FlBA)

clean_body: Together, we will keep demanding a government for the people, not for billionaires. | | | Friend, This Presidents Day, we’re resisting this President. Activists are planning anti-Trump actions all over the country for Presidents Day, and organizations have already been blocking this lawless administration’s actions in the courts. Together we will boycott, march, litigate, mobilize, speak up, and come together in solidarity. We will out-work the hate and out-organize the billionaire class. In Congress, I will keep doing everything in my power to push back against this administration’s attacks. In the past few weeks, I’ve joined local organizations to share information about immigrants’ rights, to fight for affordable health care, and to protect public education. I joined federal employees outside the Office of Personnel Management to protest the administration’s reckless efforts to dismantle our federal workforce. In the House Oversight Committee, I voted to subpoena Elon Musk to testify before Congress and explain why a billionaire who nobody voted for is apparently in charge of our government. Republicans blocked that effort, but I will keep pushing to hold Musk accountable. We won’t let the richest man on earth, who gets $20 billion in government contracts, steal money from the most vulnerable among us. As a Congresswoman, I took an oath to uphold the Constitution, which gives Congress control over federal spending and oversight authority over the president. The Constitution lays out a balance of government, which is why the White House cannot dismantle federal agencies without the approval of Congress. By illegally seizing power over our federal agencies, this president and his unelected billionaire friends are creating a constitutional crisis. I’m pushing back against attacks on agencies like the Department of Education and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, which protects working people from getting ripped off. In March, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau was set to eliminate $49 billion in medical debt from 15 million Americans’ credit reports. My team and I worked hard to help win this victory, and it’s one we must defend. In this new Congress, I was also appointed to serve on the House Financial Services Committee again, where I will keep demanding a government that puts people over profits. I’m also fighting back against this presidential administration’s attempt to roll back protections for workers and marginalized communities. Amid the GOP assault on our civil rights, I just re-introduced the Justice For All Act to give people of every background and identity the tools they need to fight discrimination in our communities. I will keep standing up for Black, brown, disabled, and LGBTQ+ Americans, and anyone else targeted by this administration. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Together we will keep advocating for an economy that works for working people, health care for all, a livable environment for future generations, and civil rights that are guaranteed to everyone. Even if they try to silence us, we know that as oppression hardens, so does the resistance. With you in this fight, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’m reaching out to thank you for being a part of this team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Even though we’re starting to make an impact, we can’t let up.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250216-4769-footer&t=1&akid=4769%2E420207%2EV9kr_-)
Hi Peter, it's Pramila Jayapal.
**I’m reaching out to thank you for being a part of this team.** We’ve been setting ambitious fundraising targets in recent weeks, and it’s thanks to your support that we’ve been able to reach them.
I know these aren’t ordinary times. Since Donald Trump’s inauguration, working people across Seattle and the country have been outraged to watch Elon Musk and his DOGE cronies **tear apart the federal government** so they can slash taxes for themselves and other billionaires.
And whether you’ve pitched in to help us reach our recent fundraising goals, joined a local organizing group, or simply kept yourself informed so you can vote to stop this madness in the next election, _**what you’re doing right now matters.**_
But even though we’re starting to make an impact, we can’t let up. We have to keep the pressure on all the way from now through the midterms, and your grassroots support is critical to making it happen.
[**Peter, if you’re with us in the fight for working people, please pitch in $3 or whatever you can to support our campaign today. We can’t do this without you!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250216?refcode=em20250216-4769&amount=3&refcode2=4769_420207_V9kr_-&akid=4769%2E420207%2EV9kr_-)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250216?amount=3&refcode=em20250216-4769&refcode2=4769_420207_V9kr_-&akid=4769%2E420207%2EV9kr_-)**
In gratitude,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250216-4769-footer&t=2&refcode2=4769_420207_V9kr_-&akid=4769%2E420207%2EV9kr_-)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
We’re two weeks into this Trump/Musk regime, and reproductive healthcare is already under attack. TOP PAC is committed to fighting back but we need your support NOW. Can you rush a $10 or $20 donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-feb25?amount=20]

RUSH $20 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-feb25?amount=20]

Here’s what you need to know about the state of reproductive freedom under the Trump administration:

✖️ RFK Jr. appears on his way to leading the Department of Health and Human Services, and his wishy-washy stance on abortion access cannot be trusted. Ted Cruz has already said he’ll vote to appoint him!

✖️ A Missouri Republican in Congress has filed a national abortion ban and already has 70 cosponsors including every single Texas Republican.

✖️ Far-right groups are pushing Trump to ban mifepristone nationally — which is already heavily restricted in Texas.

✖️ The Trump administration has scrubbed all information about reproductive healthcare from the CDC website.

These attacks on reproductive healthcare access will disproportionately affect Black and Latino communities, so it's more critical than ever for us to elect progressives who will protect all of our freedoms. Donate today to help us build a better Texas — one where members of ALL communities can thrive: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-feb25]

name: New Dems
subject: Hakeem Jeffries calls out GOP for breaking promise to lower costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Stand with House Democrats against the Project 2025 agenda! >>

| Hakeem Jeffries is _**RIGHT:**_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102241370/528539288/-917597963?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250216_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODFjN2JlMC04ZmVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=web_fIGBVjGM1-AYVOqEWVXXCZQBGZDU6JN7njp37mQ=)** | **[PITCH IN $10 TO HELP DEMOCRATS LIKE HAKEEM JEFFRIES FIGHT THE PROJECT 2025 AGENDA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102241371/528539289/-917597963?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250216_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODFjN2JlMC04ZmVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=web_fIGBVjGM1-AYVOqEWVXXCZQBGZDU6JN7njp37mQ=)**

Last election cycle, voters made it clear that their #1 issue was lowering costs for everyday Americans.

Donald Trump and Republicans campaigned on the promise to lower costs, but **ever since they took over the White House and Congress they’ve made things significantly worse for working families.**

Donald Trump has been following Project 2025 to a tee: **Gutting key programs like Social Security, imposing a 25% tax on Americans, and giving massive tax breaks to billionaires.**

**[As House Democrats like Hakeem Jeffries fight the Project 2025 agenda and flip the House in 2026, they’ll need our support. That’s why we’re asking for you to pitch in $10 today to help us fight for the people’s agenda and flip the House in 2026! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102241372/528539290/-917597963?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250216_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODFjN2JlMC04ZmVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=web_fIGBVjGM1-AYVOqEWVXXCZQBGZDU6JN7njp37mQ=)**

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Happy Black History Month, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
As the country continues to diversify, political representation isn’t keeping pace.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250216-1&t=1&akid=1744%2E587540%2E7GPmhj)
Happy Black History Month, Peter!
Every February, we’re reminded that **Black history is American history _each and every single_ day** — and not just limited to one month of the year.
As the country continues to diversify, political representation isn’t keeping pace. Black candidates and incumbents in particular face numerous structural barriers to run in _and_ win elections. **We're looking to change that, Peter.**
**[Can you pitch in $5 or more right now to support our work to elect more diverse and young candidates to office up and down the ballot?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250216-1?refcode=em20250216-1744&amount=5&refcode2=1744_587540_7GPmhj&akid=1744%2E587540%2E7GPmhj)**
We helped to elect Nadarius Clark and Bryce Berry — who have since rolled up their sleeves and delivered for their constituents.
In Virginia as a state delegate, **Nadarius Clark** has prioritized protecting reproductive rights, reducing the costs of healthcare, housing, and ensuring public schools are fully funded. He also wrote the bill to raise teacher pay to the national average to attract and retain the best educators.
**Bryce Berry — the first Gen-Z member elected to the Georgia House** was elected last year on a platform to address gun violence and build an economy that works for all Georgians. **As the only active teacher in the entire state legislature,** his experience as an educator and community organizer provide him with a unique background that is well suited to serve the needs of his district.
**Peter, it's clear: having elected officials in office with an array of diverse backgrounds benefits us all.**
Leaders We Deserve is working toward a brighter and more equitable future by helping to elect more Black and other diverse candidates to office up and down the ballot, across the country. Your support will provide us with the resources to support more of these changemakers.
**[If you can, please chip in $5 or even just a few dollars to power our work to give young and diverse candidates a seat at the table.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250216-1?refcode=em20250216-1744&amount=5&refcode2=1744_587540_7GPmhj&akid=1744%2E587540%2E7GPmhj)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250216-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250216-1744&refcode2=1744_587540_7GPmhj&akid=1744%2E587540%2E7GPmhj)**
Thank you!
— Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250216-1&t=2&refcode2=1744_587540_7GPmhj&akid=1744%2E587540%2E7GPmhj)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1744%2E587540%2E7GPmhj)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1744%2E587540%2E7GPmhj)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

subject: The “crown jewel” of the radical left
body:
I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before. | | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c84c89f8fed24f8e8fe0f0c1cd9a8538&_e=F_CO0YiQeCdh2IOvPN_llTnBTk_Nh-yAv-odKBt3VmrGPI3vUDiLtC7mgxGiYMAIwC5xGCLhzPiOZtmq-fUrF1tuOjxZXWO3oSwXZAg81NgRoqVm6nx7ffECq1ccc4GqW48GcGSZSYSjh0-3rHHocmynICIOnil-wdmwsPjDut2hW8EWeK3bmFacMIuXeO2OQotQuG_xKZmqzReJKJN7DHIaveAl649m8izctVnfK3ChGKdDa8YtleKvz2A6yR47-AO6X9XDZba6qJlCzANhw6veVy8209StMqgL7oBVs8AI7L3NS6ajL57H2kiBVoWyZjyhbbdo_dHWv0phLoMkGcjr_UpTwc6P_Da0q0I0jcqvPxvbpnkAlUCA2PHwJRw3TSttBu7XvzKFneX5fxxXnTQcBfL0MuDoVWSoEwSbmEk%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c84c89f8fed24f8e8fe0f0c1cd9a8538&_e=F_CO0YiQeCdh2IOvPN_llTnBTk_Nh-yAv-odKBt3VmrGPI3vUDiLtC7mgxGiYMAIwC5xGCLhzPiOZtmq-fUrF1tuOjxZXWO3oSwXZAg81NgRoqVm6nx7ffECq1ccc4GqW48GcGSZSYSjh0-3rHHocmynICIOnil-wdmwsPjDut2hW8EWeK3bmFacMIuXeO2OQotQuG_xKZmqzReJKJN7DHIaveAl649m8izctVnfK3ChGKdDa8YtleKvz2A6yR47-AO6X9XDZba6qJlCzANhw_7sZyQ1GRz0hvcwShltPwkfrImdS5GkqOVcVjFQ_fnX9UU5N2DUnkEPW4PZXfyaCanHNO1k1Uo2ZrV8Kiuz77uNx1bXij_2LCDv6q3FANybRP1Csgso_VseVYxSnCYBsD0h7vHh4qj08U6GjwTmmxM%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c84c89f8fed24f8e8fe0f0c1cd9a8538&_e=F_CO0YiQeCdh2IOvPN_llTnBTk_Nh-yAv-odKBt3VmrGPI3vUDiLtC7mgxGiYMAIwC5xGCLhzPiOZtmq-fUrF1tuOjxZXWO3oSwXZAg81NgRoqVm6nx7ffECq1ccc4GqW48GcGSZSYSjh0-3rHHocmynICIOnil-wdmwsPjDut2hW8EWeK3bmFacMIuXeO2OQotQuG_xKZmqzReJKJN7DHIaveAl649m8izctVnfK3ChGKdDa8YtleKvz2A6yR47-AO6X9XDZba6qJlCzANhw5kW3FFAKLaZAqXMa664GzLOzxyaIDSQNJFwN8Zq-1hlaz4oUOzxu-qqvmuSuCkUHUWqoSwxizjy_tlnuVF1lPgZpUBfSH_TSw_PWCuWsi4CPDIrsJnPFaGDmSM0-bWex28RJ51E0KhY_pFUBwFDD44%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c84c89f8fed24f8e8fe0f0c1cd9a8538&_e=F_CO0YiQeCdh2IOvPN_llTnBTk_Nh-yAv-odKBt3VmrGPI3vUDiLtC7mgxGiYMAIwC5xGCLhzPiOZtmq-fUrF1tuOjxZXWO3oSwXZAg81NgRoqVm6nx7ffECq1ccc4GqW48GcGSZSYSjh0-3rHHocmynICIOnil-wdmwsPjDut2hW8EWeK3bmFacMIuXeO2OQotQuG_xKZmqzReJKJN7DHIaveAl649m8izctVnfK3ChGKdDa8YtleKvz2A6yR47-AO6X9XDZba6qJlCzANhw00JixkehVC5hyZs6YJTt4n7bVq5R4eSR9UKRI25WQJNUb4Mw_Nyb08GV_h5_s3ZQw_58ecpWmX2qMvtrzUR2l3nufo7YwdFS-Rz4aIEptcfGkMO0-Bv4KPfNChPirz869HZS_EtGq60r_wFQgrbvNA%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.

Sincerely,

subject: Rep. Raskin’s mic drop! 🎤 ⬇️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Someone is finally speaking up!!!
| FINALLY, we have Democratic heroes like Jamie Raskin FIGHTING BACK!!! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86930?t=6&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr) **We know what this means:** _Trump, his MAGA trifecta, and his billionaire buddies _WILL_ go after Rep. Raskin, again (!) — _and we need to be prepared.__

We’re sending Rep. Raskin a letter tomorrow at 9 AM sharp to show our support and stand with him in the face of MAGA attacks: [**Will you join the top 99 Democrats in your state and add your name? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86930?t=7&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH REP. JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86930?t=8&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank You! Rep. Raskin,

**I couldn’t be more thrilled to have your voice in the House at this critical time in our history — you are one of the most heroic Representatives we have, and I’m so grateful.**

As a key part of the January 6th committee, you stood up to Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans over and over again. _Now the GOP is furious at you,_but you continue to stand strong and lead our party forward.__

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of the work you’ve done to hold MAGA Republicans accountable – so I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to VPP to keep electing incredible Democrats just like you. As long as you keep fighting for Democracy, we’ll be beside you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86930?t=9&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr)

Standing with you, **_X A grateful Democrat_** | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH REP. JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86930?t=10&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr)
---
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18932%2E878179%2EmmzfCr)
