subject: Voter poll: Election integrity claims
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021625_1&amount=25]
ABC: Election integrity concerns fade after resounding Trump victory [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/ABC_ElectionIntegrityConcerns.png]
Joe Biden addressed the nation after the 2024 election, stating " I hope we can lay to rest the question about the integrity of the American electoral system. It is honest, it is fair, and it is transparent, and it can be trusted, win or lose. "
We want to hear from voters in your area about the relentless attacks on our elections and the conspiracy theories on voting that we've heard nonstop for nearly a decade. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you think opponents of voting rights were dishonest in their attacks on voting the last few years?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=021625_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=021625_1&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021625_1&amount=25]

name: Dan Carr
subject: Why Party Registration Matters:
body:
When people register with a political party, they signal where they stand and what they believe in.

| |
---|---|---
|
# Why Party Registration Matters:
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Feb 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
When people register with a political party, they signal where they stand and what they believe in. I think that closing our primaries will strengthen each political political parties turnout. The goal of each political party should be to build a strong base of voters. If we build a strong base in the primary election we will see a substantial increase in the general election.
[CLICK TO FINISH READING:](https://substack.com/redirect/06850fdb-bf0a-460e-af8d-2459de29e4d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Steve Daines
subject: I want to give you an exclusive look

body:
We’re just hours from the halfway mark for our first mandated Federal Election Commission (FEC) Fundraising Quarter Deadline of the 2025-2026 Election Cycle. |
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=95ca3fd0c4ca436ba1f0d018092c723a&_e=RpqSmeZAJgmpUwBHWBA25xub80rzGW9nScPB9CO_ZnPlNf7u_OzQMgtaGbHIol3Xfx5bxIDfdEDLsbG3VMOaC-8YzqvzeqUG_u9E2S48hLI8dlzPTOW_te49qrfJdScpyxvPvJNgaXN_uXIhI87L6eEmAJO2qQZfMRSX4g6MalsX8zzJR0LZIrKXlIEaopcEx19JeSaePpHbbj8-8wreoPxwemesRlMuz6w7jYWNxwERrEBYmZUq611vlBOKQko-qFnSupnxQnhGO2b0duL0oBOxIfDDKgGWWDkNbhUp9GCnLUqCqFLsdXNPRYKsCGLEXX3SZfvutJ22RWBQjXQ0QRrL1T7Ctr2WydvVVNFHK7Ht8f97EPstRiN9dmpEZAMRO5Bpyli79mSCQM8D3lHWujgU5ZeVA9eaAq48xBSnnnldOLNyQYnLI-i8Pw2isNgy)

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan thinks YOU’RE crazy!
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
The only thing Jim Jordan loves more than chasing MAGA conspiracy theories is hearing himself talk.
And this week, surprise, surprise—he was in front of the cameras again.
On Fox Business, Jordan called Democrats the “party of crazy.”
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250216_crazy_dems_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250216_crazy_dems_image]
I just have to ask—does he own a mirror?
Because let’s be clear about who the real lunatic is here:
* Jim Jordan, who literally helped plot the January 6th insurrection and refused to comply with a subpoena about it.

* Jim Jordan, who defends domestic terrorists who beat cops with flagpoles.

* Jim Jordan, who covered up the sexual abuse of his own recruits and wrestlers for The Ohio State University and then lied about it to protect himself,

* Jim Jordan, who is called a “legislative terrorist” by members of his own party,

* Jim Jordan, pretends to advocate for the people, our constituents, but he consistently votes against US every chance he gets!
And this is the guy calling US crazy? OK!
I refuse to let a traitor like Jim Jordan get away with rewriting history. And if you’re with me, I need you in this fight today. Donate $25, $50, or more now to help us take him down. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250216_crazy_dems_link1]
The truth is Jim Jordan wants chaos because chaos is all he knows.
He’s not working for Ohio. He’s not working for everyday Americans.
He’s working for himself, for the billionaires, and for the extremists who want to burn it all down.
That’s what this fight is about—whether we let cowards like Jim Jordan get away with it.
We’re not just watching this disaster unfold.
He wants us to forget that he ignored subpoenas about his role in January 6th. That he turned a blind eye to the abuse of student-athletes at Ohio State. That he abuses his position in Congress to shield Trump and attack his political enemies.
But we’re not forgetting. We’re watching.
Every time he spews more lies, we’ll be there to call him out. Every time he tries to push his dangerous, anti-democratic agenda, we’ll fight back.
And we need your help.
We are taking on Jim Jordan’s ULTRA-MAGA clown show right now, but we can’t do it without the resources to hit back every time he gets in front of a camera to spread his garbage. Will you rush a contribution today to help us keep up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250216_crazy_dems_link2]
Jim Jordan thinks he can get away with it. He’s wrong.
We’re on him. And we won’t let him win.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

name: Pat Herrity
subject: Herrity Headlines - 02/16/2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

With each passing week of this campaign, I'm grateful for the many opportunities to speak with Republicans about the issues facing our Commonwealth and the issues facing their local communities. Below I also share my thoughts on one of my guiding principles - Transparency
---
| |
---

This week took me to Orange County, where I had the pleasure of speaking with the passionate conservatives of the Lake of the Woods Republican Club.
---
| |
---
Moving towards Richmond, I had the opportunity to visit with the Hanover County Republican Committee, where we talked about how important it is that we keep our statewide elected offices in Republican hands this year, to curb the progressive liberal agenda being pushed in Richmond.
---
| |
---
The next day I had the opportunity to tour Louisa County with their Board of Supervisors Chairman, Duane Adams. It was a pleasure to meet so many community leaders, small business owners, and elected officials, and to see some of their facilities.
---
| |
---
We wrapped up this week with the Grand Opening of our campaign headquarters in Fairfax County - where more than 150 fired up supporters joined us to see the space and hear about the campaign. A special thank you to Congressman Tom Davis for joining us, and to James Thomas for firing up the crowd!
---
|
---
---
| At the office opening, we also talked about the ballot access process and our need to collect 10,000 signatures of registered voters in order to be listed on the ballot.

If you haven't yet had the chance to get involved, we could use your help with collecting those signatures and ensuring my name is listed on the ballot on June 17th!

---
| [Click Here to Help Collect Signatures](mailto:info@patforva.com?subject=I'd%20like%20to%20help%20Pat%20get%20on%20the%20ballot!&body=Please%20send%20me%20ballot%20access%20petition%20forms%2C%20and%20instructions%20on%20how%20to%20circulate%20them! "Click Here to Help Collect Signatures")
---
|
---
| This week we rolled out several local endorsements, among them Culpeper Councilman Jon Russell and former Fairfax Clerk of the Court John Frey.
---
| |
---

Councilman Jon Russell, who previously served as chairman of the Culpeper County Republican Committee, has been a fierce advocate for Republicans in Culpeper and his support will be hugely influential for my campaign in Culpeper County.
---
| |
---

Former Clerk John Frey is beloved by the citizens of Fairfax. As the last Republican in Fairfax still in office, it means even more to have the support of such a popular and influential former Republican as John.
---
|
---
| **Guiding Principal Of Transparency**
I wanted to take a moment in this week's newsletter to highlight the importance of Transparency. One of my favorite things I heard people say about my Dad was that "You may not always agree with him, but you always knew where he stood." That's a mentality that I've taken to heart over my years of public service.

Since first taking office, I've published a regular newsletter covering the important issues facing the residents of Fairfax County, and where I stand on those issues. It's all laid out, regularly, for any interested party to see the issues and to see where I stand.

It's called The Herrity Report, and you can access an archive of every issue I've ever put out by _[clicking here](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=020da5f961&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Protected by Outlook: https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/springfield/herrity-report. Click or tap to follow the link.")_. Just as important as sharing how I feel on an issue is the feedback I get back from readers. I learn something every day and I want to hear every perspective - it gets us better answers.

As I have traveled the Commonwealth, I've had countless discussions with voters on a broad range of issues. On every issue, my guiding principle is to seek the commonsense, conservative solutions that benefit all Virginians.

That said, we will not always agree. That's ok, and that's healthy. Open honest discussion always gets you to better answers. I have had a lot of those discussions, and I have learned a lot from those discussions. What I will not do is compromise on my conservative principles.

As I engage in this campaign to represent the residents of the Commonwealth as your next Lieutenant Governor, it's important to me that you understand the emphasis I put on transparency. I believe that you, the voters and residents of Virginia, have a right to know what's going on in our government, a way to provide input on those issues and a right to know where I stand on the issues.

As your Lieutenant Governor, transparency is a guiding principle that will continue to be at the forefront of how I serve.
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

---
| [Make a Contribution](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=6d95243152&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Make a Contribution")
---
|
---
| If you received this email as a forward, I'd love for you sign up for Herrity Headlines to receive these updates every week, directly from my campaign:
---
| [Sign Up for Herrity's Headline](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=6380388347&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Sign Up for Herrity's Headline")
---
|
---
| P.S. - Please save the date of March 16th for my annual Saint Patrick's Day Celebration in Fairfax County! We'll feature an exciting special guest, and the opportunity to learn more and get involved with my campaign for Lieutenant Governor this year!
---
| [RSVP for the St Patrick's Day Party!](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=4538cf1ae1&e=a1ea0f9c99 "RSVP for the St Patrick's Day Party!")
---
|
---

---

You can [update your preferences](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=d781537a35) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&t=b&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=d781537a35)

"Click Here to Help Collect Signatures" | | This week we rolled out several local endorsements, among them Culpeper Councilman Jon Russell and former Fairfax Clerk of the Court John Frey. | | Councilman Jon Russell, who previously served as chairman of the Culpeper County Republican Committee, has been a fierce advocate for Republicans in Culpeper and his support will be hugely influential for my campaign in Culpeper County. | | Former Clerk John Frey is beloved by the citizens of Fairfax. As the last Republican in Fairfax still in office, it means even more to have the support of such a popular and influential former Republican as John. | | Guiding Principal Of Transparency I wanted to take a moment in this week's newsletter to highlight the importance of Transparency. One of my favorite things I heard people say about my Dad was that "You may not always agree with him, but you always knew where he stood." That's a mentality that I've taken to heart over my years of public service. Since first taking office, I've published a regular newsletter covering the important issues facing the residents of Fairfax County, and where I stand on those issues. It's all laid out, regularly, for any interested party to see the issues and to see where I stand. It's called The Herrity Report, and you can access an archive of every issue I've ever put out by "Protected by Outlook: . Click or tap to follow the link.". Just as important as sharing how I feel on an issue is the feedback I get back from readers. I learn something every day and I want to hear every perspective - it gets us better answers. As I have traveled the Commonwealth, I've had countless discussions with voters on a broad range of issues. On every issue, my guiding principle is to seek the commonsense, conservative solutions that benefit all Virginians. That said, we will not always agree. That's ok, and that's healthy. Open honest discussion always gets you to better answers. I have had a lot of those discussions, and I have learned a lot from those discussions. What I will not do is compromise on my conservative principles. As I engage in this campaign to represent the residents of the Commonwealth as your next Lieutenant Governor, it's important to me that you understand the emphasis I put on transparency. I believe that you, the voters and residents of Virginia, have a right to know what's going on in our government, a way to provide input on those issues and a right to know where I stand on the issues. As your Lieutenant Governor, transparency is a guiding principle that will continue to be at the forefront of how I serve. | | | Pat Herrity Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County Candidate for Lieutenant Governor | "Make a Contribution" | | If you received this email as a forward, I'd love for you sign up for Herrity Headlines to receive these updates every week, directly from my campaign: | "Sign Up for Herrity's Headline" | | P.S. - Please save the date of March 16th for my annual Saint Patrick's Day Celebration in Fairfax County! We'll feature an exciting special guest, and the opportunity to learn more and get involved with my campaign for Lieutenant Governor this year! | "RSVP for the St Patrick's Day Party!" | | | | | | | | | | | www.patforva.com | | Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity | | | Copyright © 2025 Friends of Pat Herrity, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Friends of Pat HerrityP.O Box 2863Springfield, VA 22152 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

| Hi there, We now have a new Chair of the DNC. That’s why last week we sent around a survey asking for input from our members on the future of our party. And what we learned is super interesting Firstly, we asked how folks are feeling about Donald Trump’s Presidency so far. No surprise, his approval rating with California Democrats is rock bottom — **only 4% of respondents are neutral or approve of his administration.** We need to keep getting our message out so the general population understands our deep concerns with how he’s ignoring the needs of working Americans to focus on grievances and abuses of power. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102251022/528567507/1964907898?refcode=20250216_STU_45DO_SurveyResponse&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQ0NGRjNC1iYWVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ANJdyrlekSHTbAHcVAi36irlyvEvU4K6zoeVOyFwuI=) We also asked in our survey what our members see as the top priority for the DNC. People care about numerous issues, **but 83.5% of responses say that our top priority is defending the Constitution** in the face of Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s assault on our democracy. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102251023/528567508/1964907898?refcode=20250216_STU_45DO_SurveyResponse&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQ0NGRjNC1iYWVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ANJdyrlekSHTbAHcVAi36irlyvEvU4K6zoeVOyFwuI=) Finally, we wanted to get input on political tactics. We asked what tactics should be the top priority of the DNC. **33% thought the DNC should spend most time responding to Donald Trump, but 27% also said that a messaging revamp was needed**. Investments in organizing and activating influencers and podcasters also got a large chunk of support too. In reality, the DNC and Democratic Parties around the country probably need to do all of these things! And we are so grateful you are here to help us do it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102251024/528567509/1964907898?refcode=20250216_STU_45DO_SurveyResponse&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQ0NGRjNC1iYWVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ANJdyrlekSHTbAHcVAi36irlyvEvU4K6zoeVOyFwuI=) Thank you so much to everyone who took part in our survey! This was super interesting to read, and was very valuable to our full team. **[If you’re ready to start funding our work that will reshape the Democratic Party in California, please chip in now. We need you in this fight!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102251025/528567510/1964907898?refcode=20250216_STU_45DO_SurveyResponse&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQ0NGRjNC1iYWVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ANJdyrlekSHTbAHcVAi36irlyvEvU4K6zoeVOyFwuI=)** [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102251026/528567511/1964907898?&refcode=20250216_STU_45DO_SurveyResponse&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQ0NGRjNC1iYWVjLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ANJdyrlekSHTbAHcVAi36irlyvEvU4K6zoeVOyFwuI=)

clean_body: Your results: | = | Hi there, We now have a new Chair of the DNC. That’s why last week we sent around a survey asking for input from our members on the future of our party. And what we learned is super interesting Firstly, we asked how folks are feeling about Donald Trump’s Presidency so far. No surprise, his approval rating with California Democrats is rock bottom — only 4% of respondents are neutral or approve of his administration. We need to keep getting our message out so the general population understands our deep concerns with how he’s ignoring the needs of working Americans to focus on grievances and abuses of power. = We also asked in our survey what our members see as the top priority for the DNC. People care about numerous issues, but 83.5% of responses say that our top priority is defending the Constitution in the face of Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s assault on our democracy. = Finally, we wanted to get input on political tactics. We asked what tactics should be the top priority of the DNC. 33% thought the DNC should spend most time responding to Donald Trump, but 27% also said that a messaging revamp was needed. Investments in organizing and activating influencers and podcasters also got a large chunk of support too. In reality, the DNC and Democratic Parties around the country probably need to do all of these things! And we are so grateful you are here to help us do it. = Thank you so much to everyone who took part in our survey! This was super interesting to read, and was very valuable to our full team. = = = = = = Yours, \- Camille | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: AMAC Action
subject: Elon Musk is right
body:
Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. | |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9420623797cf4c3582e387f797a6d6f9&_e=dX7TQRCJWioh7FcZMbuU54BPq8kO6t09yNANWn0FvUYkM5TJfbVvyYrLycnL4Ga6SRvdv7bqUjOhC_JC6QzZMR5k6VE44X4HG3uenf2Dal9PMRepcZ6g1foeVckshUyrcyCx9aMVAn6l3DpfGUa5xLIr2cpb27yj56P4Qb2_hO8WAq91RGKMgjVhKs_UUMp0RvdWNODnTkUDcp6yxUkVLFyUHRGz7LC4PsoPFrByqHH6layvuPkAFXlj8e7ksZq0ZWb5z2Q-Po9L8j6BOC9HDNvOKVFJOUMAEv7oDcpBH2pNYwC6xJfzYmQHBc0EDXtRITXlOWtFbQ3qcxQYFtNNUtG_V66gcyGqXvbF28diVqg%3D)

| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9420623797cf4c3582e387f797a6d6f9&_e=dX7TQRCJWioh7FcZMbuU54BPq8kO6t09yNANWn0FvUYkM5TJfbVvyYrLycnL4Ga6SRvdv7bqUjOhC_JC6QzZMR5k6VE44X4HG3uenf2Dal9PMRepcZ6g1foeVckshUyrcyCx9aMVAn6l3DpfGUa5xLIr2cpb27yj56P4Qb2_hO8WAq91RGKMgjVhKs_UUMp0RvdWNODnTkUDcp6yxUkVLHL07QpK7bsKPwmh3yTFShZ2XA5-vskkODC6Zq0lVzSwyrP71gW92tfznDzc62dur09U7lxEUe1hkpyd3rf4_7IFXeZ5YH3p1QP25yQT8AJ-YXdHWbOEaazYUetHtf5Vw6UoilWjK-sJ0uzMsSmWmu8%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9420623797cf4c3582e387f797a6d6f9&_e=dX7TQRCJWioh7FcZMbuU54BPq8kO6t09yNANWn0FvUYkM5TJfbVvyYrLycnL4Ga6SRvdv7bqUjOhC_JC6QzZMR5k6VE44X4HG3uenf2Dal9PMRepcZ6g1foeVckshUyrcyCx9aMVAn6l3DpfGUa5xLIr2cpb27yj56P4Qb2_hO8WAq91RGKMgjVhKs_UUMp0RvdWNODnTkUDcp6yxUkVLDEf0FuIlyr_WQZzQlnBKZlMoqFqcB0BKc3p63npoRACkSgcOtAy-42y_cNDjM3t-fNDgGEyX74Rq_XDUesROhlF-0tG6oK-knyu0LvITQp4Kl76k8Tn15U__mgXTe3DctvuczDYacooKwtzv8M6YvE%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9420623797cf4c3582e387f797a6d6f9&_e=dX7TQRCJWioh7FcZMbuU54BPq8kO6t09yNANWn0FvUZdYZANIjHU85GZ4_LoaSdhVCg8aq8xpMwAkERPRpR2xc62Zmjmt_8uuCIvxHjti7mJCX_ZYtKeQ_zBh2TCIwGR3gUVT6A__yd_YycCBJfu-yNl6Hu9ttB88KgarFWTRKIo41Wjljl-KKZMMyD20ttbzMO2qmDQuHhbBgLxEan4A2ARfHPyneh7sIfxuSW4Eo4%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9420623797cf4c3582e387f797a6d6f9&_e=dX7TQRCJWioh7FcZMbuU54BPq8kO6t09yNANWn0FvUYkM5TJfbVvyYrLycnL4Ga6SRvdv7bqUjOhC_JC6QzZMR5k6VE44X4HG3uenf2Dal9PMRepcZ6g1foeVckshUyrcyCx9aMVAn6l3DpfGUa5xLIr2cpb27yj56P4Qb2_hO8WAq91RGKMgjVhKs_UUMp0RvdWNODnTkUDcp6yxUkVLPTP76pL2caBEhXghHN75D9AoBLUf6lfpaV3hKUbW0IEgKbvLtAM_isb0xecgQSqq941_o_UJdEEfuZnSI9BywcSKULAuyQbZOxqs2u_DLJcQuNpX0maimSZAK29jVYPFQivI3GM-xo1O8IKkSOClfQ%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9420623797cf4c3582e387f797a6d6f9&_e=dX7TQRCJWioh7FcZMbuU54BPq8kO6t09yNANWn0FvUYkM5TJfbVvyYrLycnL4Ga6SRvdv7bqUjOhC_JC6QzZMR5k6VE44X4HG3uenf2Dal9PMRepcZ6g1foeVckshUyrcyCx9aMVAn6l3DpfGUa5xLIr2cpb27yj56P4Qb2_hO8WAq91RGKMgjVhKs_UUMp0RvdWNODnTkUDcp6yxUkVLPIt8h1ODNJ_eAsfw3hw6GLcArc8wekI81yzSc33Wa0d-ChteOFlrImuCwMPxZ_rBbSdVTLbGp8ZAJYqsBr8zC13dTq9HIeNthZgCoCW-miS5EgLcBL9nY0tka6uwK7vY_vzsfDjzU6-1so6bAVjqR0%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9420623797cf4c3582e387f797a6d6f9&_e=dX7TQRCJWioh7FcZMbuU54BPq8kO6t09yNANWn0FvUYkM5TJfbVvyYrLycnL4Ga6SRvdv7bqUjOhC_JC6QzZMR5k6VE44X4HG3uenf2Dal9PMRepcZ6g1foeVckshUyrcyCx9aMVAn6l3DpfGUa5xLIr2cpb27yj56P4Qb2_hO8WAq91RGKMgjVhKs_UUMp0RvdWNODnTkUDcp6yxUkVLNKeG_fwJW_lFsuu9SWMpginW6ZOf4-luUrlzmLTYaOQkqiNzjwAqpjuilHtmX5PrIEcAXu_ljKhnaXCBAzWEsssQKFUDJzjCPNQpemCbj6g0xDGuQWp497Yh5Z887io2si7d6tfvtdejRqbwPQE3fs%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9420623797cf4c3582e387f797a6d6f9&_e=dX7TQRCJWioh7FcZMbuU54BPq8kO6t09yNANWn0FvUYkM5TJfbVvyYrLycnL4Ga6SRvdv7bqUjOhC_JC6QzZMR5k6VE44X4HG3uenf2Dal9PMRepcZ6g1foeVckshUyrcyCx9aMVAn6l3DpfGUa5xLIr2cpb27yj56P4Qb2_hO8WAq91RGKMgjVhKs_UUMp0RvdWNODnTkUDcp6yxUkVLB8bLGjD8xm0y4ltuyyWvKwj_B3mfU1dVXKkSFol6cWS6AEjsDVuL-znY6cy_YCzLlz35X2f7qvRAIAKuZy-cF5gcp92QE2cYat0_y7lmNoaWqazQdXlUnU_5Hy4eCG0HozOu2ROaBkaHhgUW41zV7I%3D)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---

clean_body: Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Our first major chance to stand up to the Trump Administration and send a national message of condemnation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends, we’re in another critical election year.
After a hard-fought 2024 and the chaotic initial weeks of Trump’s lawless second term, I know that may sound exhausting.
But the 2025 elections in Virginia represent the country’s first major chance to stand up to the Trump Administration and send a national message of condemnation of Trump’s failures.
This November, Virginia will hold elections for governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general, and the House of Delegates — our first electoral opportunity to show that Democrats are still fired up and ready to fight for our values.
Virginia is a unique place, politically. We may have gone blue in the past few presidential elections, but right now, Republicans control all three statewide offices. Our statewide elections historically have proven that we are a true battleground, and right now, it’s critical that Democrats don’t cede an inch.
I love Virginia — I’ve called it home for more than four decades. Anne and I settled our family and raised three great kids here, and I’ve been proud to serve the people of this Commonwealth throughout my entire adult life.
That’s why this year — right now — I am committing to you that I will help lead the fight to flip Virginia blue and support our great VA Democrats who are running in 2025. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Today, I’m asking you to do the same, and commit to joining me in this fight.
There are a lot of ways you can take part:
* You can sign your name to say you’re on the team [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Vmf4JXKfREiNiqDyc8fn0Q2] .
* You can chip in a contribution to my Common Ground PAC to help fund the work we’ll be doing around the state [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025] .
* You can give me a follow on social media like Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/timkaine] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/] , or Twitter/X [https://x.com/timkaine] to stay updated on our work.
* Or you could forward this email to a friend or neighbor to get them involved.
I’ll be laser-focused on supporting VA Democrats throughout the coming year, and no matter how you choose to help, having you on this team is a really important part of flipping our Commonwealth blue and sending a message to the GOP all around the country that Democrats remain strong.
Virginia’s statewide elections always fall one year after presidential elections — and since 1980, we have elected a Governor of the opposite party from the new president almost every time.
This year, it’s more important than ever before that we make sure that happens again — to send a message that Virginia will stand up for the American people and protect our democracy .
Time and again, this team has shown up when it matters most — and your contributions have led to victories in Virginia cycle after cycle. With your help, this year will be no different, so I’m incredibly grateful for your support.
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

Sen. Rand Paul **[sounded off on Sen. Richard Blumenthal](https://substack.com/redirect/7b50c8b8-3f3e-4d34-9ae7-2b4127a5f149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for calling GOP outrage over USAID's wasteful woke expenditures "not serious" during a tense senate hearing, Thursday.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7b50c8b8-3f3e-4d34-9ae7-2b4127a5f149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7b50c8b8-3f3e-4d34-9ae7-2b4127a5f149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I am disappointed that we are not having a serious hearing on how to improve USAID," Blumenthal said. "This hearing is simply designed to give cover to President Trump's unlawful dismantling of a congressionally established agency, against the law, and against the interest in this country..."
**[Paul wasn't going to let Blumenthal belittle the subject matter of the hearing](https://substack.com/redirect/7b50c8b8-3f3e-4d34-9ae7-2b4127a5f149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for one minute, firing back, "The accusation has been made that this is 'an unserious' hearing full of conspiracy theorists,... The democrats were asked to participate, like they always are,... they could have brought a witness, they chose not to."
"Maybe it's because it's SO embarrassing, the stuff that USAID is spending their money on!" Paul continued. "Who could possibly be against ending $2 million for sex change surgeries in Guatemala?!!"
**[Watch Paul absolutely destroy Blumenthal](https://substack.com/redirect/7b50c8b8-3f3e-4d34-9ae7-2b4127a5f149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for his condescending remark aimed at minimizing the issue of wasteful government spending:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7b50c8b8-3f3e-4d34-9ae7-2b4127a5f149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS: DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID**
_**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0bd05c5b-c709-46e0-95e7-660580b89911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...**
An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._
In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying.
**OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED**
They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks...
And who suffers? YOU and your family.
Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness.
Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled.
**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**
Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**.
Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the **[Patriot Power Generator](https://substack.com/redirect/0bd05c5b-c709-46e0-95e7-660580b89911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.**
And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse.
**FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.
_**And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_
Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars.
Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures...
Those who acted fast and got their **[4Patriots solar generator](https://substack.com/redirect/0bd05c5b-c709-46e0-95e7-660580b89911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers.
**[YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW& IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X](https://substack.com/redirect/0bd05c5b-c709-46e0-95e7-660580b89911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Get My Generator](https://substack.com/redirect/0bd05c5b-c709-46e0-95e7-660580b89911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: So many open seats in Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2236%2E135344%2EBBDMgv)

Friend --
As you know, I have tried to keep the fundraising emails to a minimum since the last election, but today I am asking you to split a contribution between the Michigan Senate Nominee Fund and my campaign.
Here's why:
Just a few weeks ago, Michigan's other Democratic senator, Gary Peters, announced that he would not run for re-election.
On a personal note, Gary is a mentor and dear friend who has gone out of his way to help me and get my office up-and-running over the last few months. He will be greatly missed around the Senate.
But his decision means Michigan will once again have one of the most expensive and competitive Senate races in the country.
But that is not all. Not even close.
Michigan will also have an open seat race for governor, Secretary of State, Attorney General, and if that were not enough already several U.S. House seats that could determine control of the House after the next election.
It's a lot.
After winning Michigan in the presidential election and coming very close in our race, Republicans will throw everything they can to try and sweep the board here. Control of the House, the Senate, and the swingiest of swing states is up-for-grabs.
Your contribution to the Michigan Senate Nominee Fund will go to whoever wins the Democratic Primary for U.S. Senate, putting them in a strong position the day they are officially the nominee.
You know I don't like to ask often, but this is a big moment:
[**Can you please use this link to split a $10 contribution between the Michigan Senate Nominee Fund and my re-election campaign today?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-msnf-jan25.cK2qzP&refcode=em250131-1&t=2&akid=2236%2E135344%2EBBDMgv)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Elissa Slotkin and the Michigan Senate Nominee Fund:_

clean_body: Friend -- As you know, I have tried to keep the fundraising emails to a minimum since the last election, but today I am asking you to split a contribution between the Michigan Senate Nominee Fund and my campaign. Here's why: Just a few weeks ago, Michigan's other Democratic senator, Gary Peters, announced that he would not run for re-election. On a personal note, Gary is a mentor and dear friend who has gone out of his way to help me and get my office up-and-running over the last few months. He will be greatly missed around the Senate. But his decision means Michigan will once again have one of the most expensive and competitive Senate races in the country. But that is not all. Not even close. Michigan will also have an open seat race for governor, Secretary of State, Attorney General, and if that were not enough already several U.S. House seats that could determine control of the House after the next election. It's a lot. After winning Michigan in the presidential election and coming very close in our race, Republicans will throw everything they can to try and sweep the board here. Control of the House, the Senate, and the swingiest of swing states is up-for-grabs. Your contribution to the Michigan Senate Nominee Fund will go to whoever wins the Democratic Primary for U.S. Senate, putting them in a strong position the day they are officially the nominee. You know I don't like to ask often, but this is a big moment: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Elissa Slotkin and the Michigan Senate Nominee Fund: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Elissa PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: The Democrats
subject: Tonight…
body:
---
Derek, we're reaching out to ask if you can contribute $3 to the DNC tonight. Here’s why: It’s only been less than a month since Trump took office. In that time, Trump has:
* Enacted tariffs that will raise the costs of gas and groceries for millions of people.
* Rescinded President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid.
* Given an unelected billionaire access to sensitive information about millions of Americans.
* Supported Elon Musk’s plan to fire government workers without cause and dismantle USAID — the government’s lead agency for distributing humanitarian aid and development assistance in countries all over the world.
* Pardoned more than 1,500 January 6 insurrectionists, including many who committed acts of violence against police officers.
* Attempted to end birthright citizenship, which is in the Constitution.
* Eliminated the government website with information on accessing reproductive health care.

**Democrats are fighting back. But we have to do more than just resist Trump’s agenda.** If the last month has shown us anything, it’s that we _must_ build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. That’s why we’re asking for your help today. The more contributions we receive now, while Trump’s term is just beginning, the more effective we can be in investing in state parties all over the country, in organizing against Trump’s worst policies, and ultimately in winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. [**You can use this link to make a $3 contribution tonight:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250216_2795_fr&refcode2=2795_22930333_jLXp7R&akid=2795%2E22930333%2EjLXp7R) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250216_2795_fr&refcode2=2795_22930333_jLXp7R&akid=2795%2E22930333%2EjLXp7R)**

****
Thank you for your help,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
